ko.back: Capturing the universe with ink jokes

ko.original: Street prints and golden decorative art

ko.back: Capturing the everyday life of the people
Sancheon through the eyes of Joseon
Precision with the tip of a brush
Printmaking your way through the world

ko.original: Decorative beauty bloomed on gold leaf
ko.back: The aesthetics of embellishment over gold leaf

ko.original:
Korean painters learned Chinese brushwork, but what they painted was their own land and people.
Minhwa wished for fortune through magpies and tigers, while Pungsokdo captured the daily lives of common folk.
Jingyeong Sansuhwa depicted not idealized landscapes, but the real mountains and rivers before the painter's eyes.

Empty space speaks, and spirit flows through the brush tip — that is the art of Korean traditional painting.
Wishes, daily life, and landscapes captured by the brush — meet Korean painting, bloomed from its own soil.
ko.translated:
조선의 화가들은 중국에서 건너온 화법을 배웠지만, 그들이 그린 것은 조선의 산천과 사람들이었습니다.
민화는 까치와 호랑이로 복을 빌었고, 풍속도는 서민의 일상을 담았습니다.
진경산수화는 관념이 아닌, 눈앞에 펼쳐진 실제 산천을 그렸습니다.

여백이 말하고, 붓끝에 정신을 담는 예술이 한국 전통회화입니다.
소망과 일상과 산천을 붓에 담아, 이 땅의 것으로 피워낸 한국 회화를 만납니다.
ko.back:
Joseon painters learned painting techniques from China, but what they painted were Joseon's mountains and people.
Folk paintings were blessed with magpies and tigers, and wind chimes captured the daily lives of commoners.
Jingyeong Sanshu paintings depicted the actual mountain streams in front of them, not just an idea.

Traditional Korean painting is an art where the margins speak and the brushstrokes capture the spirit.
We meet Korean paintings that are made of the earth by putting wishes, daily life, and mountain streams into the brush.

ko.original:
Before a landscape scroll, Chinese literati read the world through ink.
Ink Wash painting raised mountains with gradations of ink alone and conjured mist through empty space.
Gongbi rendered every last petal with meticulous precision, offered to the emperor.

The wellspring of East Asian art, flowing for over a millennium, is Chinese traditional painting.
Meet the depth of a thousand years, forged in ink and color.
ko.translated:
한 폭의 산수화 앞에서 중국의 문인은 세상을 읽었습니다.
수묵화는 먹의 농담만으로 산을 세우고, 여백으로 안개를 피웠습니다.
공필화는 꽃잎 한 장까지 세밀하게 그려 황제에게 바쳤습니다.

천 년 넘게 이어진 동양 회화의 원류가 중국 전통회화입니다.
먹과 채색이 빚어낸, 그 천 년의 깊이를 만납니다.
ko.back:
In front of a canvas, the Chinese literati read the world.
Ink painters built mountains out of ink jokes and fog in the margins.
Scribe paintings were drawn down to the petal of a flower and presented to the emperor.

Traditional Chinese painting is the source of over a thousand years of oriental art.
Ink and color, it's a thousand years deep.

ko.original:
In Edo’s streets, woodblock prints flourished; in Kyoto’s courts, decorative painting blossomed.
Ukiyo-e carved actors, beauties, and landscapes into woodblocks sold to the common people.
Rinpa painted irises and wind gods over gold leaf, captivating the eyes of the aristocracy.

Popular sensibility and courtly splendor coexisting — that is the art of Japanese traditional painting.
Born in streets and courts, crossing the ocean — meet Japanese painting that shook the Western art world.
ko.translated:
에도의 거리에서는 판화가, 교토의 궁정에서는 장식화가 꽃피었습니다.
우키요에는 배우와 미인, 명소의 풍경을 목판에 새겨 서민에게 팔렸습니다.
린파는 금박 위에 붓꽃과 풍신을 그려 넣어 귀족의 눈을 사로잡았습니다.

대중의 감각과 궁정의 화려함이 공존하는 예술이 일본 전통회화입니다.
거리와 궁정에서 태어나 바다를 건너, 서양을 뒤흔든 일본 회화를 만납니다.
ko.back:
Printmaking blossomed in the streets of Edo and the courts of Kyoto.
Ukiyo-e engraved scenes of actors, beauties, and landmarks on woodblocks and sold them to the common people.
Rinpa painted irises and wind gods on gold leaf to catch the eye of the aristocracy.

Traditional Japanese painting is an art that combines the sensibilities of the masses with the splendor of the court.
Born in the streets and courts, it traveled across the seas, and took the West by storm.

ko.original:
Minhwa's vibrant palette and free-spirited composition have been applied to your image.
Painted in the five cardinal colors (blue, red, yellow, white, black) and arranged freely without perspective.

Peonies symbolize wealth, carp represent success, and tigers ward off evil.
Minhwa is Joseon folk art — hung on folding screens in every home, each painting carrying a wish.
ko.translated:
민화의 화려한 색채와 자유로운 구도가 적용되었습니다.
오방색(청·적·황·백·흑)으로 칠하고, 원근법 없이 자유롭게 배치한 것이 특징입니다.

모란은 부귀, 잉어는 출세, 호랑이는 벽사를 상징합니다.
민화는 집집마다 병풍에 걸었던 조선의 생활 미술이자, 소망을 담은 그림입니다.
ko.back:
The colorful colors and free composition of a folktale.
It is characterized by being painted in five colors (blue-red-yellow-white-black) and arranged freely without perspective.

Peonies symbolize wealth, carp symbolize prosperity, and tigers symbolize wealth.
Folk paintings were Joseon's living art, hanging on folding screens in every home.

ko.original:
Pungsokdo's swift brushwork and restrained coloring have been applied to your image.
Fine-brush light-wash technique captures gestures and expressions, while empty space opens up the scene.

Wrestling men, women doing laundry, children dozing in village schools — everyday Joseon life comes alive.
Pungsokdo is Korean realism, brought to bloom by Kim Hong-do and Shin Yun-bok through the tip of a brush.
ko.translated:
풍속도의 빠른 필선과 담백한 채색이 적용되었습니다.
세필담채법으로 인물의 동작과 표정을 포착하고, 여백으로 공간을 열어둡니다.

씨름하는 장정, 빨래하는 아낙, 서당에서 조는 아이 — 조선의 일상이 살아 있습니다.
풍속도는 김홍도와 신윤복이 꽃피운, 붓끝으로 기록된 조선의 리얼리즘입니다.
ko.back:
Fast, windy inking and light coloring.
The fine brushstrokes capture the characters' movements and expressions, while the white space keeps the space open.

Jangjeong wrestling, Anak doing laundry, and a child sleeping in the seodang - everyday life in Joseon comes alive.
Punggye-do is the realism of Joseon, captured with the tip of a brush, blossomed by Kim Hong-do and Shin Yun-bok.

ko.original:
Jingyeong Sansuhwa's vigorous texture strokes and bold composition have been applied to your image.
Breaking free from idealized landscapes, painters sketched the real mountains and rivers before their eyes.

The jagged peaks of Geumgangsan and rain falling over Inwangsan come alive through powerful brushstrokes.
Jingyeong Sansuhwa is the aesthetics of real landscape, perfected by Gyeomjae Jeong Seon — Korea's own vision of nature.
ko.translated:
진경산수화의 힘찬 준법과 대담한 구도가 적용되었습니다.
이상적인 관념 산수를 벗어나, 눈앞에 펼쳐진 실제 산천을 직접 보고 그린 것이 특징입니다.

금강산의 뾰족한 봉우리와 인왕산에 내리는 비의 풍경이 힘찬 필선으로 되살아납니다.
진경산수화는 겸재 정선이 완성한, 이 땅의 진짜 풍경을 담은 미학입니다.
ko.back:
The strong adherence and bold compositions of Jingyeong Sanshu painting.
It's characterized by the fact that the artist saw and drew the actual mountain streams in front of him, rather than idealized conceptualized math.

The pointed peaks of Mt. Geumgangsan and the rain falling on Mt. Inwangsan are brought to life with powerful calligraphic lines.
Jingyeong Sansu painting is an aesthetic that captures the real scenery of the land, perfected by Jeongseon Jeongjae.

ko.original:
Gongbi's meticulous brushwork and luminous layered coloring have been applied to your image.
Fine brushes draw the outline first, then transparent colors are layered to build depth.

Flowers, birds, and figures are rendered strand by strand, captivating the imperial eye.
Gongbi is the pinnacle of East Asian fine painting — the height of color mastery, perfected by the court.
ko.translated:
공필화의 정밀한 필치와 투명한 채색이 적용되었습니다.
가느다란 붓으로 윤곽을 먼저 그리고, 투명한 색을 여러 겹 쌓아 깊이를 만듭니다.

꽃과 새, 인물을 한 올 한 올 세밀하게 그려 황제의 눈을 사로잡습니다.
공필화는 동양 세밀화의 정점이자, 궁정이 꽃피운 채색의 극치입니다.
ko.back:
A precise pencil drawing with transparent coloring.
The contours are drawn first with a thin brush, and depth is created by layering transparent colors.

The flowers, birds, and figures are painted in minute detail to catch the emperor's eye.
Gongfil painting is the pinnacle of Oriental detailing and the height of courtly coloring.

ko.original:
Ink Wash painting's fluid washes and contemplative empty space have been applied to your image.
Mountains, water, mist, and clouds are expressed through nothing but gradations of ink, and empty space becomes infinite.

The splashed-ink technique scatters ink like rain, capturing the vitality of nature.
Ink Wash painting is the purest form of East Asian painting — scholars transferred spirit, not form, onto silk.
ko.translated:
수묵화의 먹 번짐과 여백의 미학이 적용되었습니다.
먹의 농담만으로 산과 물, 안개와 구름을 표현하고, 여백은 그 자체로 무한한 공간이 됩니다.

파묵법으로 먹을 뿌리듯 번지게 하여 자연의 생명력을 담습니다.
수묵화는 문인이 붓 대신 정신을 화폭에 옮긴, 천 년 동양 회화의 정수입니다.
ko.back:
The aesthetics of ink smears and margins of an ink painting were applied.
The ink's playfulness alone creates mountains and water, fog and clouds, and the white space becomes an infinite space in itself.

The ink is smeared like a sprinkle to capture the vitality of nature.
Ink painting is the essence of a thousand years of oriental painting, when artists transferred their minds to the canvas instead of their brushes.

ko.original:
Ukiyo-e's striking outlines and vivid flat colors have been applied to your image.
Bold outlines define the form, and flat planes of color fill within — pure graphic impact.

Like Hokusai's *The Great Wave off Kanagawa*, a split second of nature's fury is carved into a single impression.
Ukiyo-e is the vision that traveled from East to West, inspiring the Impressionists to see art anew.
ko.translated:
우키요에의 강렬한 윤곽선과 평면적 색면이 적용되었습니다.
대담한 윤곽선으로 형태를 잡고, 그 안을 평면적 색면으로 채우는 것이 특징입니다.

호쿠사이의 〈가나가와의 큰 파도〉처럼 순간의 역동을 한 판에 새겨냅니다.
우키요에는 인상파에게 영감을 준, 동양에서 서양으로 건너간 시선입니다.
ko.back:
Ukiyo-e's strong outlines and flat color planes.
It is characterized by bold outlines that define the form and fill it with flat color planes.

Like Hokusai's The Great Wave of Kanagawa, it captures the dynamism of the moment on a single plate.
Ukiyo-e is the gaze that crossed from East to West, the gaze that inspired the Impressionists.

ko.original:
Rinpa's gold leaf decoration and bold composition have been applied to your image.
Pigment is laid over gold leaf, with colors pooled layer upon layer to create natural texture.

Like Ogata Korin's *Irises Screen*, vibrant nature blooms upon a field of gold.
Rinpa, born from aristocratic taste and inspiring Art Nouveau — the essence of Japanese decorative painting.
ko.translated:
린파의 금박 장식과 대담한 화면 구성이 적용되었습니다.
금박 위에 안료를 얹고, 색을 겹겹이 흘려 넣어 자연의 질감을 만듭니다.

오가타 고린의 〈붓꽃도 병풍〉처럼 화려한 자연이 금빛 위에 피어납니다.
린파는 귀족의 미감에서 태어나 아르누보에 영감을 준, 일본 장식화의 정수입니다.
ko.back:
Rinpa's gold leaf embellishments and bold screen composition.
Pigment is applied over gold leaf, and the colors are layered to create a natural texture.

Like Ogata Korin's Iris Folding Screen, colorful nature blooms on the gold.
Rinpa is the quintessence of Japanese decorative painting, born of aristocratic taste and inspiring Art Nouveau.

ko.original:
Korean traditional brushwork and the beauty of empty space have been applied to your image.
Scholars painted with ink gradations, while common folk painted with vivid color — both giving life to their world.

Empty space speaks, and spirit flows through the brush tip — the aesthetics of Korean painting.
Korean traditional painting, represented by Minhwa, Pungsokdo, and Jingyeong Sansuhwa, is art that blossomed over 500 years of Joseon. aesthetics, from Minhwa to Jingyeong Sansuhwa.
ko.translated:
한국 전통회화의 붓놀림과 여백의 미학이 적용되었습니다.
선비는 먹의 농담으로, 민중은 색채로 삶을 그린 것이 특징입니다.

여백이 말하고, 붓끝에 정신을 담는 것이 한국 회화의 미학입니다.
민화, 풍속도, 진경산수화로 대표되는 한국 전통회화는 조선 시대 500년 속에서 꽃피운 예술입니다.
ko.back:
The brushstrokes and white space aesthetic of traditional Korean painting.
Zen masters depicted ink jokes, while folk painted life in color.

The white space speaks, and the spirit is captured in the brushstroke, which is the aesthetic of Korean painting.
Korean traditional painting, represented by folk paintings, punggido, and jingyeong sanshui, is an art that blossomed during the 500 years of the Joseon Dynasty.

ko.original:
Chinese traditional ink and color harmony have been applied to your image.
A single brushstroke raises mountains, and a single empty space conjures mist.

The literati's spirit and the court's mastery coexist in Chinese painting.
Chinese traditional painting, flowing through Gongbi and Ink Wash, is a vital wellspring of over a millennium of East Asian art tradition.
ko.translated:
중국 전통회화의 먹과 채색의 조화가 적용되었습니다.
먹의 농담 하나로 산을 세우고, 여백 하나로 안개를 피우는 것이 특징입니다.

문인의 정신과 궁정의 기교가 공존하는 것이 중국 회화입니다.
공필화와 수묵화로 이어지는 중국 전통회화는 천 년 동양 회화 전통의 중요한 원류입니다.
ko.back:
The harmony of ink and color in traditional Chinese painting.
A single ink stroke can build a mountain, and a single margin can create a mist.

The spirit of the literati and the finesse of the court coexist in Chinese painting.
Traditional Chinese painting, which is a continuation of scribbling and ink painting, is an important source of the millennia-old oriental painting tradition.

ko.original:
Japanese traditional outlines and decorative color planes have been applied to your image.
Bold outlines and splendid coloring over gold leaf capture beauty in distinct ways.

Prints born from Edo popular culture and decorative painting of the court coexist in Japanese art.
Japanese traditional painting, born in streets and courts, crossed the ocean and profoundly influenced Western art.
ko.translated:
일본 전통회화의 윤곽선과 장식적 색면이 적용되었습니다.
대담한 윤곽선과 금박 위의 화려한 채색으로 아름다움을 새기는 것이 특징입니다.

에도의 대중문화에서 태어난 판화와 궁정의 장식화가 공존하는 예술입니다.
일본 전통회화는 거리와 궁정에서 태어나 바다를 건너 서양 미술에 큰 영향을 준 예술입니다.
ko.back:
The outlines and decorative coloring of traditional Japanese paintings.
It's characterized by bold outlines and brilliant coloring over gold leaf to inscribe beauty.

It is an art that coexists between printmaking and court decorative painting, born out of the popular culture of Edo.
Traditional Japanese painting is an art that was born in the streets and courts, and crossed the ocean to greatly influence Western art.
Capturing the universe with ink jokes

ko.back: Capturing the everyday life of the people
Sancheon through the eyes of Joseon
Precision with the tip of a brush
Printmaking your way through the world

Minhwa is Joseon folk art — hung on folding screens in every home, each painting carrying a wish.
ko.translated:
민화의 화려한 색채와 자유로운 구도가 적용되었습니다.
오방색(청·적·황·백·흑)으로 칠하고, 원근법 없이 자유롭게 배치한 것이 특징입니다.

모란은 부귀, 잉어는 출세, 호랑이는 벽사를 상징합니다.
민화는 집집마다 병풍에 걸었던 조선의 생활 미술이자, 소망을 담은 그림입니다.
ko.back:
The colorful colors and free composition of a folktale.
It is characterized by being painted in five colors (blue-red-yellow-white-black) and arranged freely without perspective.

Peonies symbolize wealth, carp symbolize prosperity, and tigers symbolize wealth.
Folk paintings were Joseon's living art, hanging on folding screens in every home.

ko.original:
Pungsokdo's swift brushwork and restrained coloring have been applied to your image.
Fine-brush light-wash technique captures gestures and expressions, while empty space opens up the scene.

Wrestling men, women doing laundry, children dozing in village schools — everyday Joseon life comes alive.
Pungsokdo is Korean realism, brought to bloom by Kim Hong-do and Shin Yun-bok through the tip of a brush.
ko.translated:
풍속도의 빠른 필선과 담백한 채색이 적용되었습니다.
세필담채법으로 인물의 동작과 표정을 포착하고, 여백으로 공간을 열어둡니다.

씨름하는 장정, 빨래하는 아낙, 서당에서 조는 아이 — 조선의 일상이 살아 있습니다.
풍속도는 김홍도와 신윤복이 꽃피운, 붓끝으로 기록된 조선의 리얼리즘입니다.
ko.back:
Fast, windy inking and light coloring.
The fine brushstrokes capture the characters' movements and expressions, while the white space keeps the space open.

Jangjeong wrestling, Anak doing laundry, and a child sleeping in the seodang - everyday life in Joseon comes alive.
Punggye-do is the realism of Joseon, captured with the tip of a brush, blossomed by Kim Hong-do and Shin Yun-bok.

ko.original:
Jingyeong Sansuhwa's vigorous texture strokes and bold composition have been applied to your image.
Breaking free from idealized landscapes, painters sketched the real mountains and rivers before their eyes.

The jagged peaks of Geumgangsan and rain falling over Inwangsan come alive through powerful brushstrokes.
Jingyeong Sansuhwa is the aesthetics of real landscape, perfected by Gyeomjae Jeong Seon — Korea's own vision of nature.
ko.translated:
진경산수화의 힘찬 준법과 대담한 구도가 적용되었습니다.
이상적인 관념 산수를 벗어나, 눈앞에 펼쳐진 실제 산천을 직접 보고 그린 것이 특징입니다.

금강산의 뾰족한 봉우리와 인왕산에 내리는 비의 풍경이 힘찬 필선으로 되살아납니다.
진경산수화는 겸재 정선이 완성한, 이 땅의 진짜 풍경을 담은 미학입니다.
ko.back:
The strong adherence and bold compositions of Jingyeong Sanshu painting.
It's characterized by the fact that the artist saw and drew the actual mountain streams in front of him, rather than idealized conceptualized math.

The pointed peaks of Mt. Geumgangsan and the rain falling on Mt. Inwangsan are brought to life with powerful calligraphic lines.
Jingyeong Sansu painting is an aesthetic that captures the real scenery of the land, perfected by Jeongseon Jeongjae.

ko.original:
Gongbi's meticulous brushwork and luminous layered coloring have been applied to your image.
Fine brushes draw the outline first, then transparent colors are layered to build depth.

Flowers, birds, and figures are rendered strand by strand, captivating the imperial eye.
Gongbi is the pinnacle of East Asian fine painting — the height of color mastery, perfected by the court.
ko.translated:
공필화의 정밀한 필치와 투명한 채색이 적용되었습니다.
가느다란 붓으로 윤곽을 먼저 그리고, 투명한 색을 여러 겹 쌓아 깊이를 만듭니다.

꽃과 새, 인물을 한 올 한 올 세밀하게 그려 황제의 눈을 사로잡습니다.
공필화는 동양 세밀화의 정점이자, 궁정이 꽃피운 채색의 극치입니다.
ko.back:
A precise pencil drawing with transparent coloring.
The contours are drawn first with a thin brush, and depth is created by layering transparent colors.

The flowers, birds, and figures are painted in minute detail to catch the emperor's eye.
Gongfil painting is the pinnacle of Oriental detailing and the height of courtly coloring.

ko.original:
Ink Wash painting's fluid washes and contemplative empty space have been applied to your image.
Mountains, water, mist, and clouds are expressed through nothing but gradations of ink, and empty space becomes infinite.

The splashed-ink technique scatters ink like rain, capturing the vitality of nature.
Ink Wash painting is the purest form of East Asian painting — scholars transferred spirit, not form, onto silk.
ko.translated:
수묵화의 먹 번짐과 여백의 미학이 적용되었습니다.
먹의 농담만으로 산과 물, 안개와 구름을 표현하고, 여백은 그 자체로 무한한 공간이 됩니다.

파묵법으로 먹을 뿌리듯 번지게 하여 자연의 생명력을 담습니다.
수묵화는 문인이 붓 대신 정신을 화폭에 옮긴, 천 년 동양 회화의 정수입니다.
ko.back:
The aesthetics of ink smears and margins of an ink painting were applied.
The ink's playfulness alone creates mountains and water, fog and clouds, and the white space becomes an infinite space in itself.

The ink is smeared like a sprinkle to capture the vitality of nature.
Ink painting is the essence of a thousand years of oriental painting, when artists transferred their minds to the canvas instead of their brushes.

ko.original:
Ukiyo-e's striking outlines and vivid flat colors have been applied to your image.
Bold outlines define the form, and flat planes of color fill within — pure graphic impact.

Like Hokusai's *The Great Wave off Kanagawa*, a split second of nature's fury is carved into a single impression.
Ukiyo-e is the vision that traveled from East to West, inspiring the Impressionists to see art anew.
ko.translated:
우키요에의 강렬한 윤곽선과 평면적 색면이 적용되었습니다.
대담한 윤곽선으로 형태를 잡고, 그 안을 평면적 색면으로 채우는 것이 특징입니다.

호쿠사이의 〈가나가와의 큰 파도〉처럼 순간의 역동을 한 판에 새겨냅니다.
우키요에는 인상파에게 영감을 준, 동양에서 서양으로 건너간 시선입니다.
ko.back:
Ukiyo-e's strong outlines and flat color planes.
It is characterized by bold outlines that define the form and fill it with flat color planes.

Like Hokusai's The Great Wave of Kanagawa, it captures the dynamism of the moment on a single plate.
Ukiyo-e is the gaze that crossed from East to West, the gaze that inspired the Impressionists.

ko.original:
Rinpa's gold leaf decoration and bold composition have been applied to your image.
Pigment is laid over gold leaf, with colors pooled layer upon layer to create natural texture.

Like Ogata Korin's *Irises Screen*, vibrant nature blooms upon a field of gold.
Rinpa, born from aristocratic taste and inspiring Art Nouveau — the essence of Japanese decorative painting.
ko.translated:
린파의 금박 장식과 대담한 화면 구성이 적용되었습니다.
금박 위에 안료를 얹고, 색을 겹겹이 흘려 넣어 자연의 질감을 만듭니다.

오가타 고린의 〈붓꽃도 병풍〉처럼 화려한 자연이 금빛 위에 피어납니다.
린파는 귀족의 미감에서 태어나 아르누보에 영감을 준, 일본 장식화의 정수입니다.
ko.back:
Rinpa's gold leaf embellishments and bold screen composition.
Pigment is applied over gold leaf, and the colors are layered to create a natural texture.

Like Ogata Korin's Iris Folding Screen, colorful nature blooms on the gold.
Rinpa is the quintessence of Japanese decorative painting, born of aristocratic taste and inspiring Art Nouveau.

ko.original:
Korean traditional brushwork and the beauty of empty space have been applied to your image.
Scholars painted with ink gradations, while common folk painted with vivid color — both giving life to their world.

Empty space speaks, and spirit flows through the brush tip — the aesthetics of Korean painting.
Korean traditional painting, represented by Minhwa, Pungsokdo, and Jingyeong Sansuhwa, is art that blossomed over 500 years of Joseon. aesthetics, from Minhwa to Jingyeong Sansuhwa.
ko.translated:
한국 전통회화의 붓놀림과 여백의 미학이 적용되었습니다.
선비는 먹의 농담으로, 민중은 색채로 삶을 그린 것이 특징입니다.

여백이 말하고, 붓끝에 정신을 담는 것이 한국 회화의 미학입니다.
민화, 풍속도, 진경산수화로 대표되는 한국 전통회화는 조선 시대 500년 속에서 꽃피운 예술입니다.
ko.back:
The brushstrokes and white space aesthetic of traditional Korean painting.
Zen masters depicted ink jokes, while folk painted life in color.

The white space speaks, and the spirit is captured in the brushstroke, which is the aesthetic of Korean painting.
Korean traditional painting, represented by folk paintings, punggido, and jingyeong sanshui, is an art that blossomed during the 500 years of the Joseon Dynasty.

ko.original:
Chinese traditional ink and color harmony have been applied to your image.
A single brushstroke raises mountains, and a single empty space conjures mist.

The literati's spirit and the court's mastery coexist in Chinese painting.
Chinese traditional painting, flowing through Gongbi and Ink Wash, is a vital wellspring of over a millennium of East Asian art tradition.
ko.translated:
중국 전통회화의 먹과 채색의 조화가 적용되었습니다.
먹의 농담 하나로 산을 세우고, 여백 하나로 안개를 피우는 것이 특징입니다.

문인의 정신과 궁정의 기교가 공존하는 것이 중국 회화입니다.
공필화와 수묵화로 이어지는 중국 전통회화는 천 년 동양 회화 전통의 중요한 원류입니다.
ko.back:
The harmony of ink and color in traditional Chinese painting.
A single ink stroke can build a mountain, and a single margin can create a mist.

The spirit of the literati and the finesse of the court coexist in Chinese painting.
Traditional Chinese painting, which is a continuation of scribbling and ink painting, is an important source of the millennia-old oriental painting tradition.

ko.original:
Japanese traditional outlines and decorative color planes have been applied to your image.
Bold outlines and splendid coloring over gold leaf capture beauty in distinct ways.

Prints born from Edo popular culture and decorative painting of the court coexist in Japanese art.
Japanese traditional painting, born in streets and courts, crossed the ocean and profoundly influenced Western art.
ko.translated:
일본 전통회화의 윤곽선과 장식적 색면이 적용되었습니다.
대담한 윤곽선과 금박 위의 화려한 채색으로 아름다움을 새기는 것이 특징입니다.

에도의 대중문화에서 태어난 판화와 궁정의 장식화가 공존하는 예술입니다.
일본 전통회화는 거리와 궁정에서 태어나 바다를 건너 서양 미술에 큰 영향을 준 예술입니다.
ko.back:
The outlines and decorative coloring of traditional Japanese paintings.
It's characterized by bold outlines and brilliant coloring over gold leaf to inscribe beauty.

It is an art that coexists between printmaking and court decorative painting, born out of the popular culture of Edo.
Traditional Japanese painting is an art that was born in the streets and courts, and crossed the ocean to greatly influence Western art.

ja.back: engrave the floating world on woodblocks

ja.back: Japanese Traditional Painting

ja.back: Rimpa

ja.original: Decorative beauty bloomed on gold leaf
ja.translated: 金箔の上に咲く装飾の美学
ja.back: Aesthetics of decoration blooming on gold leaf

ja.original:
Korean painters learned Chinese brushwork, but what they painted was their own land and people.
Minhwa wished for fortune through magpies and tigers, while Pungsokdo captured the daily lives of common folk.
Jingyeong Sansuhwa depicted not idealized landscapes, but the real mountains and rivers before the painter's eyes.

Empty space speaks, and spirit flows through the brush tip — that is the art of Korean traditional painting.
Wishes, daily life, and landscapes captured by the brush — meet Korean painting, bloomed from its own soil.
ja.translated:
朝鮮の画家たちは中国から伝わった画法を学びましたが、描いたのはこの地の山河と人々でした。
民画はカササギと虎で福を祈り、風俗図は庶民の暮らしを記録しました。
真景山水画は観念ではなく、目の前に広がる実際の山河を描きました。

余白が語り、筆先に精神を宿す芸術が韓国伝統絵画です。
願いと日常と山河を筆に込め、この地ならではの美を咲かせた韓国絵画に出会います。
ja.back:
Joseon painters learned painting techniques imported from China, but what they painted were the mountains, rivers, and people of the region.
Folk paintings used magpies and tigers to pray for good fortune, and genre paintings recorded the lives of ordinary people.
The "true landscape" paintings depicted the actual mountains and rivers stretching out before them, rather than conceptual images.

Traditional Korean painting is an art form in which the blank space speaks and the spirit resides in the brushstrokes.
We will encounter Korean paintings that capture the beauty unique to this region by capturing wishes, daily life, and mountains and rivers in the brush strokes.

ja.original:
Before a landscape scroll, Chinese literati read the world through ink.
Ink Wash painting raised mountains with gradations of ink alone and conjured mist through empty space.
Gongbi rendered every last petal with meticulous precision, offered to the emperor.

The wellspring of East Asian art, flowing for over a millennium, is Chinese traditional painting.
Meet the depth of a thousand years, forged in ink and color.
ja.translated:
一幅の山水画の前で、中国の文人は世界を読み取りました。
水墨画は墨の濃淡だけで山を立て、余白で霧を漂わせました。
工筆画は花弁の一枚一枚まで精密に描き、皇帝に献上されました。

千年以上受け継がれてきた東洋絵画の源流が中国伝統絵画です。
墨と彩色が紡いだ、その千年の深みに出会います。
ja.back:
In front of a single landscape painting, Chinese literati read the world.
In ink paintings, mountains were formed using only shades of black ink, and the margins were used to create a misty atmosphere.
The paintings were presented to the emperor with their precise rendering down to the petals of the flowers.

Traditional Chinese painting is the origin of Oriental painting, which has been handed down for more than 1,000 years.
We will encounter the depth of the millennium spun by ink and color.

ja.original:
In Edo’s streets, woodblock prints flourished; in Kyoto’s courts, decorative painting blossomed.
Ukiyo-e carved actors, beauties, and landscapes into woodblocks sold to the common people.
Rinpa painted irises and wind gods over gold leaf, captivating the eyes of the aristocracy.

Popular sensibility and courtly splendor coexisting — that is the art of Japanese traditional painting.
Born in streets and courts, crossing the ocean — meet Japanese painting that shook the Western art world.
ja.translated:
江戸の街では版画が、京都の宮廷では装飾画が花開きました。
浮世絵は役者や美人、名所の風景を木版に彫り、庶民に広く親しまれました。
琳派は金箔の上に燕子花や風神を描き入れ、貴族の目を奪いました。

大衆の感覚と宮廷の華やかさが共存する芸術が日本伝統絵画です。
街と宮廷で生まれ海を渡り、西洋を揺るがした日本絵画に出会います。
ja.back:
Prints blossomed in the streets of Edo (Tokyo) and decorative paintings blossomed at the court of Kyoto.
Ukiyoe, woodblock prints of actors, beauties, and famous landscapes, were widely popular among the common people.
Rimpa school paintings of swallow-tail flowers and wind gods on gold leaf caught the attention of the nobility.

Traditional Japanese painting is an art form in which the sensibilities of the masses and the splendor of the court coexist.
We will encounter Japanese paintings that were born in the city and at court, crossed the sea, and shook the West.

ja.original:
Minhwa's vibrant palette and free-spirited composition have been applied to your image.
Painted in the five cardinal colors (blue, red, yellow, white, black) and arranged freely without perspective.

Peonies symbolize wealth, carp represent success, and tigers ward off evil.
Minhwa is Joseon folk art — hung on folding screens in every home, each painting carrying a wish.
ja.translated:
民画の華やかな色彩と自由な構図が適用されています。
五方色（青・赤・黄・白・黒）で彩り、遠近法にとらわれず自由に配置しているのが特徴です。

牡丹は富貴、鯉は立身出世、虎は魔除けを象徴しています。
民画は家々の屏風に掛けられた朝鮮の生活美術であり、願いを込めた絵です。
ja.back:
The gorgeous colors and free composition of folk painting are applied.
It is characterized by the use of five colors (blue, red, yellow, white, and black) for coloring and free arrangement without being restricted by perspective.

The peony symbolizes wealth and nobility, the carp stands for success in life, and the tiger protects against evil.
Mingga (folk paintings), hanging on the screens of houses, were the art of daily life in the Joseon Dynasty, and were paintings of wishes.

ja.original:
Pungsokdo's swift brushwork and restrained coloring have been applied to your image.
Fine-brush light-wash technique captures gestures and expressions, while empty space opens up the scene.

Wrestling men, women doing laundry, children dozing in village schools — everyday Joseon life comes alive.
Pungsokdo is Korean realism, brought to bloom by Kim Hong-do and Shin Yun-bok through the tip of a brush.
ja.translated:
風俗図の素早い筆線と淡泊な彩色が適用されています。
細筆淡彩法で人物の動きと表情を捉え、余白で空間に広がりを持たせています。

相撲を取る若者、洗濯をする女性、書堂で居眠りする子ども — 朝鮮の日常が生き生きと息づいています。
風俗図は金弘道と申潤福が花開かせた、筆先で記録された朝鮮のリアリズムです。
ja.back:
The quick brush strokes and light colors of genre painting are applied.
The fine-stroke, light-colored method captures the movement and expression of the figures, and the margins create a sense of spaciousness.

A young man wrestling, a woman doing the laundry, and a child dozing in a bookstore - the daily life of the Joseon Dynasty comes alive.
The genre paintings represent the realism of Joseon recorded with the brushstrokes of Kim Hong-do and Shin Jun-bok.

ja.original:
Jingyeong Sansuhwa's vigorous texture strokes and bold composition have been applied to your image.
Breaking free from idealized landscapes, painters sketched the real mountains and rivers before their eyes.

The jagged peaks of Geumgangsan and rain falling over Inwangsan come alive through powerful brushstrokes.
Jingyeong Sansuhwa is the aesthetics of real landscape, perfected by Gyeomjae Jeong Seon — Korea's own vision of nature.
ja.translated:
真景山水画の力強い皴法と大胆な構図が適用されています。
理想化された観念山水を脱し、目の前に広がる実際の山河を直接見て描いているのが特徴です。

金剛山の鋭い峰々と仁王山に降る雨の風景が力強い筆線で蘇ります。
真景山水画は謙斎・鄭敾が完成した、この地の本当の風景を捉えた美学です。
ja.back:
The powerful brushstrokes and bold compositions of true landscape painting are applied.
The artist has abandoned idealized landscapes in favor of direct observation of the actual mountains and rivers stretching out before his eyes.

The sharp peaks of Mount Kongo and the rain falling on Mount Niou are brought to life with powerful brush strokes.
Shinkei Sansuiga is an aesthetic that was perfected by Jensai and Zheng Xi to capture the true landscape of the region.

ja.original:
Gongbi's meticulous brushwork and luminous layered coloring have been applied to your image.
Fine brushes draw the outline first, then transparent colors are layered to build depth.

Flowers, birds, and figures are rendered strand by strand, captivating the imperial eye.
Gongbi is the pinnacle of East Asian fine painting — the height of color mastery, perfected by the court.
ja.translated:
工筆画の精密な筆致と透明な彩色が適用されています。
細い筆で輪郭を先に描き、透明な色を何層も重ねて深みを出しています。

花鳥、人物を一筋一筋精密に描き、皇帝の目を奪いました。
工筆画は東洋細密画の頂点であり、宮廷が花開かせた彩色の極致です。
ja.back:
The precise brush strokes and transparent coloring of an industrial brush painting are applied.
The outlines are drawn first with fine brush strokes, and then layers of transparent colors are applied to create depth.

Flowers, birds, and figures were painted line by line with precision, capturing the emperor's attention.
The miniature brush painting is the pinnacle of oriental miniature painting, and is a masterpiece of coloring that flourished at the imperial court.

ja.original:
Ink Wash painting's fluid washes and contemplative empty space have been applied to your image.
Mountains, water, mist, and clouds are expressed through nothing but gradations of ink, and empty space becomes infinite.

The splashed-ink technique scatters ink like rain, capturing the vitality of nature.
Ink Wash painting is the purest form of East Asian painting — scholars transferred spirit, not form, onto silk.
ja.translated:
水墨画の墨の滲みと余白の美学が適用されています。
墨の濃淡だけで山と水、霧と雲を表現し、余白はそれ自体が無限の空間となっています。

潑墨法で墨を撒くように滲ませ、自然の生命力を捉えています。
水墨画は文人が筆の代わりに精神を画面に移した、千年の東洋絵画の精髄です。
ja.back:
The aesthetics of ink blotting and margins of Suiboku-ga (ink painting) are applied.
Mountains and water, fog and clouds are represented by the shades of ink alone, and the margins are themselves infinite space.

The sprightly ink method is used to blot the ink as if sprinkling it, capturing the life force of nature.
Suiboku-ga is the essence of Oriental painting of the millennium, in which literati artists transferred their spirit to the screen in place of the brush.

ja.original:
Ukiyo-e's striking outlines and vivid flat colors have been applied to your image.
Bold outlines define the form, and flat planes of color fill within — pure graphic impact.

Like Hokusai's *The Great Wave off Kanagawa*, a split second of nature's fury is carved into a single impression.
Ukiyo-e is the vision that traveled from East to West, inspiring the Impressionists to see art anew.
ja.translated:
浮世絵の力強い輪郭線と平面的な色面が適用されています。
大胆な輪郭線で形を捉え、その中を平面的な色面で満たしているのが特徴です。

葛飾北斎の〈神奈川沖浪裏〉のように、一瞬の躍動を一枚の版に刻み込んでいます。
浮世絵は印象派に霊感を与えた、東洋から西洋へ渡った眼差しです。
ja.back:
The strong outlines and flat color surfaces of ukiyo-e are applied.
The bold outlines capture the shapes, and the flat color surfaces fill in the shapes.

Like Katsushika Hokusai's "Kanagawa Okinamiura," a single plate is filled with the dynamism of a single moment.
Ukiyoe is the eye that crossed from the East to the West, which inspired the Impressionists.

ja.original:
Rinpa's gold leaf decoration and bold composition have been applied to your image.
Pigment is laid over gold leaf, with colors pooled layer upon layer to create natural texture.

Like Ogata Korin's *Irises Screen*, vibrant nature blooms upon a field of gold.
Rinpa, born from aristocratic taste and inspiring Art Nouveau — the essence of Japanese decorative painting.
ja.translated:
琳派の金箔装飾と大胆な画面構成が適用されています。
金箔の上に顔料を載せ、色を幾重にも滲ませて自然の質感を生み出しています。

尾形光琳の〈燕子花図屏風〉のように、華やかな自然が金色の上に花開いています。
琳派は貴族の美意識から生まれ、アール・ヌーヴォーに霊感を与えた、日本装飾画の精髄です。
ja.back:
The gold leaf decoration and bold screen composition of the Rimpa school are applied.
Pigment is placed on top of the gold leaf, blotting out layers of color to create a natural texture.

As in Korin Ogata's "Swallowtail Flowers," gorgeous nature blooms on gold.
The Rimpa school is the essence of Japanese decorative painting, born of the aristocratic aesthetic and inspired by Art Nouveau.

ja.original:
Korean traditional brushwork and the beauty of empty space have been applied to your image.
Scholars painted with ink gradations, while common folk painted with vivid color — both giving life to their world.

Empty space speaks, and spirit flows through the brush tip — the aesthetics of Korean painting.
Korean traditional painting, represented by Minhwa, Pungsokdo, and Jingyeong Sansuhwa, is art that blossomed over 500 years of Joseon. aesthetics, from Minhwa to Jingyeong Sansuhwa.
ja.translated:
韓国伝統絵画の筆運びと余白の美学が適用されています。
士人は墨の濃淡で、民衆は色彩で暮らしを描いたのが特徴です。

余白が語り、筆先に精神を宿すのが韓国絵画の美学です。
民画、風俗図、真景山水画に代表される韓国伝統絵画は、朝鮮時代五百年の中で花開いた芸術です。
ja.back:
The aesthetics of brushwork and margins of traditional Korean painting are applied.
The artists used shades of ink to depict the lives of the samurai, while the people used colors to depict the lives of the people.

It is the aesthetic of Korean painting that the margins speak and the spirit dwells in the brushstrokes.
Traditional Korean painting, as typified by folk paintings, genre paintings, and true landscape paintings, is an art form that flourished during the five hundred years of the Joseon Dynasty.

ja.original:
Chinese traditional ink and color harmony have been applied to your image.
A single brushstroke raises mountains, and a single empty space conjures mist.

The literati's spirit and the court's mastery coexist in Chinese painting.
Chinese traditional painting, flowing through Gongbi and Ink Wash, is a vital wellspring of over a millennium of East Asian art tradition.
ja.translated:
中国伝統絵画の墨と彩色の調和が適用されています。
墨の濃淡一つで山を立て、余白一つで霧を漂わせるのが特徴です。

文人の精神と宮廷の技巧が共存するのが中国絵画です。
工筆画と水墨画へと連なる中国伝統絵画は、千年の東洋絵画伝統の重要な源流です。
ja.back:
The harmony of ink and color in traditional Chinese painting is applied.
A single shade of ink is used to set up a mountain, and a single margin is used to create a drifting mist.

Chinese painting is the coexistence of the spirit of the literati and the techniques of the court.
Traditional Chinese painting, which is connected to the art of brush painting and ink painting, is an important source of the millennia-old tradition of Oriental painting.

ja.original:
Japanese traditional outlines and decorative color planes have been applied to your image.
Bold outlines and splendid coloring over gold leaf capture beauty in distinct ways.

Prints born from Edo popular culture and decorative painting of the court coexist in Japanese art.
Japanese traditional painting, born in streets and courts, crossed the ocean and profoundly influenced Western art.
ja.translated:
日本伝統絵画の輪郭線と装飾的な色面が適用されています。
大胆な輪郭線と金箔の上の華やかな彩色で美を刻むのが特徴です。

江戸の大衆文化から生まれた版画と宮廷の装飾画が共存する芸術です。
日本伝統絵画は街と宮廷で生まれ海を渡り、西洋美術に大きな影響を与えた芸術です。
ja.back:
The contours and decorative color surfaces of traditional Japanese painting are applied.
It is characterized by bold outlines and gorgeous coloring on gold leaf to engrave beauty.

It is an art form in which prints from the popular culture of Edo (1603-1867) and decorative paintings of the court coexist.
Traditional Japanese painting is an art form that was born in the city and at court, crossed the sea, and greatly influenced Western art.

ja.original:
Korean painters learned Chinese brushwork, but what they painted was their own land and people.
Minhwa wished for fortune through magpies and tigers, while Pungsokdo captured the daily lives of common folk.
Jingyeong Sansuhwa depicted not idealized landscapes, but the real mountains and rivers before the painter's eyes.

Empty space speaks, and spirit flows through the brush tip — that is the art of Korean traditional painting.
Wishes, daily life, and landscapes captured by the brush — meet Korean painting, bloomed from its own soil.
ja.translated:
朝鮮の画家たちは中国から伝わった画法を学びましたが、描いたのはこの地の山河と人々でした。
民画はカササギと虎で福を祈り、風俗図は庶民の暮らしを記録しました。
真景山水画は観念ではなく、目の前に広がる実際の山河を描きました。

余白が語り、筆先に精神を宿す芸術が韓国伝統絵画です。
願いと日常と山河を筆に込め、この地ならではの美を咲かせた韓国絵画に出会います。
ja.back:
Joseon painters learned painting techniques imported from China, but what they painted were the mountains, rivers, and people of the region.
Folk paintings used magpies and tigers to pray for good fortune, and genre paintings recorded the lives of ordinary people.
The "true landscape" paintings depicted the actual mountains and rivers stretching out before them, rather than conceptual images.

Traditional Korean painting is an art form in which the blank space speaks and the spirit resides in the brushstrokes.
We will encounter Korean paintings that capture the beauty unique to this region by capturing wishes, daily life, and mountains and rivers in the brush strokes.

ja.original:
Before a landscape scroll, Chinese literati read the world through ink.
Ink Wash painting raised mountains with gradations of ink alone and conjured mist through empty space.
Gongbi rendered every last petal with meticulous precision, offered to the emperor.

The wellspring of East Asian art, flowing for over a millennium, is Chinese traditional painting.
Meet the depth of a thousand years, forged in ink and color.
ja.translated:
一幅の山水画の前で、中国の文人は世界を読み取りました。
水墨画は墨の濃淡だけで山を立て、余白で霧を漂わせました。
工筆画は花弁の一枚一枚まで精密に描き、皇帝に献上されました。

千年以上受け継がれてきた東洋絵画の源流が中国伝統絵画です。
墨と彩色が紡いだ、その千年の深みに出会います。
ja.back:
In front of a single landscape painting, Chinese literati read the world.
In ink paintings, mountains were formed using only shades of black ink, and the margins were used to create a misty atmosphere.
The paintings were presented to the emperor with their precise rendering down to the petals of the flowers.

Traditional Chinese painting is the origin of Oriental painting, which has been handed down for more than 1,000 years.
We will encounter the depth of the millennium spun by ink and color.

ja.original:
In Edo’s streets, woodblock prints flourished; in Kyoto’s courts, decorative painting blossomed.
Ukiyo-e carved actors, beauties, and landscapes into woodblocks sold to the common people.
Rinpa painted irises and wind gods over gold leaf, captivating the eyes of the aristocracy.

Popular sensibility and courtly splendor coexisting — that is the art of Japanese traditional painting.
Born in streets and courts, crossing the ocean — meet Japanese painting that shook the Western art world.
ja.translated:
江戸の街では版画が、京都の宮廷では装飾画が花開きました。
浮世絵は役者や美人、名所の風景を木版に彫り、庶民に広く親しまれました。
琳派は金箔の上に燕子花や風神を描き入れ、貴族の目を奪いました。

大衆の感覚と宮廷の華やかさが共存する芸術が日本伝統絵画です。
街と宮廷で生まれ海を渡り、西洋を揺るがした日本絵画に出会います。
ja.back:
Prints blossomed in the streets of Edo (Tokyo) and decorative paintings blossomed at the court of Kyoto.
Ukiyoe, woodblock prints of actors, beauties, and famous landscapes, were widely popular among the common people.
Rimpa school paintings of swallow-tail flowers and wind gods on gold leaf caught the attention of the nobility.

Traditional Japanese painting is an art form in which the sensibilities of the masses and the splendor of the court coexist.
We will encounter Japanese paintings that were born in the city and at court, crossed the sea, and shook the West.

ja.original:
Minhwa's vibrant palette and free-spirited composition have been applied to your image.
Painted in the five cardinal colors (blue, red, yellow, white, black) and arranged freely without perspective.

Peonies symbolize wealth, carp represent success, and tigers ward off evil.
Minhwa is Joseon folk art — hung on folding screens in every home, each painting carrying a wish.
ja.translated:
民画の華やかな色彩と自由な構図が適用されています。
五方色（青・赤・黄・白・黒）で彩り、遠近法にとらわれず自由に配置しているのが特徴です。

牡丹は富貴、鯉は立身出世、虎は魔除けを象徴しています。
民画は家々の屏風に掛けられた朝鮮の生活美術であり、願いを込めた絵です。
ja.back:
The gorgeous colors and free composition of folk painting are applied.
It is characterized by the use of five colors (blue, red, yellow, white, and black) for coloring and free arrangement without being restricted by perspective.

The peony symbolizes wealth and nobility, the carp stands for success in life, and the tiger protects against evil.
Mingga (folk paintings), hanging on the screens of houses, were the art of daily life in the Joseon Dynasty, and were paintings of wishes.

ja.original:
Pungsokdo's swift brushwork and restrained coloring have been applied to your image.
Fine-brush light-wash technique captures gestures and expressions, while empty space opens up the scene.

Wrestling men, women doing laundry, children dozing in village schools — everyday Joseon life comes alive.
Pungsokdo is Korean realism, brought to bloom by Kim Hong-do and Shin Yun-bok through the tip of a brush.
ja.translated:
風俗図の素早い筆線と淡泊な彩色が適用されています。
細筆淡彩法で人物の動きと表情を捉え、余白で空間に広がりを持たせています。

相撲を取る若者、洗濯をする女性、書堂で居眠りする子ども — 朝鮮の日常が生き生きと息づいています。
風俗図は金弘道と申潤福が花開かせた、筆先で記録された朝鮮のリアリズムです。
ja.back:
The quick brush strokes and light colors of genre painting are applied.
The fine-stroke, light-colored method captures the movement and expression of the figures, and the margins create a sense of spaciousness.

A young man wrestling, a woman doing the laundry, and a child dozing in a bookstore - the daily life of the Joseon Dynasty comes alive.
The genre paintings represent the realism of Joseon recorded with the brushstrokes of Kim Hong-do and Shin Jun-bok.

ja.original:
Jingyeong Sansuhwa's vigorous texture strokes and bold composition have been applied to your image.
Breaking free from idealized landscapes, painters sketched the real mountains and rivers before their eyes.

The jagged peaks of Geumgangsan and rain falling over Inwangsan come alive through powerful brushstrokes.
Jingyeong Sansuhwa is the aesthetics of real landscape, perfected by Gyeomjae Jeong Seon — Korea's own vision of nature.
ja.translated:
真景山水画の力強い皴法と大胆な構図が適用されています。
理想化された観念山水を脱し、目の前に広がる実際の山河を直接見て描いているのが特徴です。

金剛山の鋭い峰々と仁王山に降る雨の風景が力強い筆線で蘇ります。
真景山水画は謙斎・鄭敾が完成した、この地の本当の風景を捉えた美学です。
ja.back:
The powerful brushstrokes and bold compositions of true landscape painting are applied.
The artist has abandoned idealized landscapes in favor of direct observation of the actual mountains and rivers stretching out before his eyes.

The sharp peaks of Mount Kongo and the rain falling on Mount Niou are brought to life with powerful brush strokes.
Shinkei Sansuiga is an aesthetic that was perfected by Jensai and Zheng Xi to capture the true landscape of the region.

ja.original:
Gongbi's meticulous brushwork and luminous layered coloring have been applied to your image.
Fine brushes draw the outline first, then transparent colors are layered to build depth.

Flowers, birds, and figures are rendered strand by strand, captivating the imperial eye.
Gongbi is the pinnacle of East Asian fine painting — the height of color mastery, perfected by the court.

工筆画は東洋細密画の頂点であり、宮廷が花開かせた彩色の極致です。

ja.original:
Chinese traditional ink and color harmony have been applied to your image.
A single brushstroke raises mountains, and a single empty space conjures mist.

The literati's spirit and the court's mastery coexist in Chinese painting.
Chinese traditional painting, flowing through Gongbi and Ink Wash, is a vital wellspring of over a millennium of East Asian art tradition.
ja.translated:
中国伝統絵画の墨と彩色の調和が適用されています。
墨の濃淡一つで山を立て、余白一つで霧を漂わせるのが特徴です。

文人の精神と宮廷の技巧が共存するのが中国絵画です。
工筆画と水墨画へと連なる中国伝統絵画は、千年の東洋絵画伝統の重要な源流です。
ja.back:
The harmony of ink and color in traditional Chinese painting is applied.
A single shade of ink is used to set up a mountain, and a single margin is used to create a drifting mist.

Chinese painting is the coexistence of the spirit of the literati and the techniques of the court.
Traditional Chinese painting, which is connected to the art of brush painting and ink painting, is an important source of the millennia-old tradition of Oriental painting.

ja.original:
Japanese traditional outlines and decorative color planes have been applied to your image.
Bold outlines and splendid coloring over gold leaf capture beauty in distinct ways.

Prints born from Edo popular culture and decorative painting of the court coexist in Japanese art.
Japanese traditional painting, born in streets and courts, crossed the ocean and profoundly influenced Western art.
ja.translated:
日本伝統絵画の輪郭線と装飾的な色面が適用されています。
大胆な輪郭線と金箔の上の華やかな彩色で美を刻むのが特徴です。

江戸の大衆文化から生まれた版画と宮廷の装飾画が共存する芸術です。
日本伝統絵画は街と宮廷で生まれ海を渡り、西洋美術に大きな影響を与えた芸術です。
ja.back:
The contours and decorative color surfaces of traditional Japanese painting are applied.
It is characterized by bold outlines and gorgeous coloring on gold leaf to engrave beauty.

It is an art form in which prints from the popular culture of Edo (1603-1867) and decorative paintings of the court coexist.
Traditional Japanese painting is an art form that was born in the city and at court, crossed the sea, and greatly influenced Western art.

es.original: Street prints and golden decorative art

es.translated: Los deseos del pueblo hechos imagen
es.back: The wishes of the people made image

es.translated: Las montañas de Joseon con ojos propios
es.back: The Joseon Mountains with your own eyes

es.translated: El paisaje del espíritu en tinta
es.back: The landscape of the spirit in ink

es.translated: El mundo flotante grabado en madera
es.back: The floating world engraved on wood

es.original: Decorative beauty bloomed on gold leaf
es.translated: La estética decorativa sobre pan de oro

es.original:
Korean painters learned Chinese brushwork, but what they painted was their own land and people.
Minhwa wished for fortune through magpies and tigers, while Pungsokdo captured the daily lives of common folk.
Jingyeong Sansuhwa depicted not idealized landscapes, but the real mountains and rivers before the painter's eyes.

Empty space speaks, and spirit flows through the brush tip — that is the art of Korean traditional painting.
Wishes, daily life, and landscapes captured by the brush — meet Korean painting, bloomed from its own soil.
es.translated:
Los pintores de Joseon aprendieron las técnicas chinas, pero lo que pintaron fue su propia tierra y su gente.
La minhwa invocaba la buena fortuna con urracas y tigres; la pungsokdo registraba la vida del pueblo llano.
La jingyeong sansuhwa no pintaba paisajes idealizados, sino las montañas reales que se extendían ante sus ojos.

Un arte donde el vacío habla y el pincel alberga el espíritu: esa es la pintura tradicional coreana.
Deseos, cotidianidad y montañas captados con el pincel, florecidos como algo propio de esta tierra.
es.back:
Joseon painters learned Chinese techniques, but what they painted was their own land and people.
The minhwa invoked good fortune with magpies and tigers; the pungsokdo recorded the life of the common people.
The jingyeong sansuhwa painted not idealized landscapes, but the real mountains that stretched before their eyes.

An art where emptiness speaks and the brush harbors the spirit: this is traditional Korean painting.
Desires, everyday life and mountains captured with the brush, flourished as something proper to this land.

es.original:
Before a landscape scroll, Chinese literati read the world through ink.
Ink Wash painting raised mountains with gradations of ink alone and conjured mist through empty space.
Gongbi rendered every last petal with meticulous precision, offered to the emperor.

The wellspring of East Asian art, flowing for over a millennium, is Chinese traditional painting.
Meet the depth of a thousand years, forged in ink and color.
es.translated:
Ante un solo paisaje pintado, el literato chino leía el mundo entero.
La pintura de tinta levantaba montañas con simples gradaciones de tinta y hacía brotar la niebla con el vacío.
La gongbi pintaba hasta el último pétalo con minuciosa precisión para ofrecerla al emperador.

La fuente milenaria de la pintura oriental es la pintura tradicional china.
Mil años tejidos con tinta y color: la raíz de toda la pintura del Este.
es.back:
Before a single painted landscape, the Chinese litterateur read the whole world.
The ink painting raised mountains with simple gradations of ink and made the mist gush with emptiness.
The gongbi painted every last petal with meticulous precision to offer it to the emperor.

The millenary source of oriental painting is traditional Chinese painting.
A thousand years woven with ink and color: the root of all Eastern painting.

es.original:
In Edo’s streets, woodblock prints flourished; in Kyoto’s courts, decorative painting blossomed.
Ukiyo-e carved actors, beauties, and landscapes into woodblocks sold to the common people.
Rinpa painted irises and wind gods over gold leaf, captivating the eyes of the aristocracy.

Popular sensibility and courtly splendor coexisting — that is the art of Japanese traditional painting.
Born in streets and courts, crossing the ocean — meet Japanese painting that shook the Western art world.
es.translated:
En las calles de Edo florecieron los grabados; en las cortes de Kioto, la pintura decorativa.
El ukiyo-e grababa actores, bellezas y paisajes famosos en bloques de madera para el pueblo.
La rinpa pintaba lirios y dioses del viento sobre pan de oro, cautivando los ojos de la aristocracia.

Un arte donde la sensibilidad popular y el esplendor cortesano coexisten: esa es la pintura tradicional japonesa.
La pintura tradicional japonesa, nacida en las calles y las cortes, cruzó el mar e influyó profundamente en el arte occidental.
es.back:
In the streets of Edo, engravings flourished; in the courts of Kyoto, decorative painting.
Ukiyo-e engraved actors, beauties and famous landscapes on woodblocks for the people.
Rinpa painted lilies and wind gods on gold leaf, captivating the eyes of the aristocracy.

An art where popular sensibility and courtly splendor coexist: that is traditional Japanese painting.
Traditional Japanese painting, born in the streets and courts, crossed the sea and deeply influenced Western art.

es.original:
Minhwa's vibrant palette and free-spirited composition have been applied to your image.
Painted in the five cardinal colors (blue, red, yellow, white, black) and arranged freely without perspective.

Peonies symbolize wealth, carp represent success, and tigers ward off evil.
Minhwa is Joseon folk art — hung on folding screens in every home, each painting carrying a wish.
es.translated:
Se han aplicado los colores vivos y la composición libre de la minhwa.
Pintada con los cinco colores cardinales (azul, rojo, amarillo, blanco, negro) y dispuesta libremente sin perspectiva.

La peonía simboliza riqueza, la carpa representa el ascenso social y el tigre ahuyenta los males.
Minhwa es arte popular de Joseon que adornaba los biombos de cada hogar, portando deseos y esperanzas.
es.back:
The vivid colors and free composition of the minhwa have been applied.
Painted with the five cardinal colors (blue, red, yellow, white, black) and freely arranged without perspective.

The peony symbolizes wealth, the carp represents social climbing and the tiger drives away evils.
Minhwa is Joseon folk art that adorned the screens of every home, carrying wishes and hopes.

es.original:
Pungsokdo's swift brushwork and restrained coloring have been applied to your image.
Fine-brush light-wash technique captures gestures and expressions, while empty space opens up the scene.

Wrestling men, women doing laundry, children dozing in village schools — everyday Joseon life comes alive.
Pungsokdo is Korean realism, brought to bloom by Kim Hong-do and Shin Yun-bok through the tip of a brush.
es.translated:
Se han aplicado los trazos rápidos y el color sobrio de la pungsokdo.
La técnica de pincel fino y color ligero captura el movimiento y las expresiones, dejando espacio con el vacío.

Luchadores, lavanderas, un niño durmiendo en la escuela — la vida cotidiana de Joseon cobra vida.
Pungsokdo es el realismo coreano que Kim Hong-do y Shin Yun-bok hicieron florecer con la punta del pincel.
es.back:
The quick strokes and sober color of pungsokdo have been applied.
The fine brush technique and light color captures movement and expressions, leaving space with emptiness.

Wrestlers, washerwomen, a child sleeping in school - everyday Joseon life comes to life.
Pungsokdo is the Korean realism that Kim Hong-do and Shin Yun-bok made flourish with the tip of the brush.

es.original:
Jingyeong Sansuhwa's vigorous texture strokes and bold composition have been applied to your image.
Breaking free from idealized landscapes, painters sketched the real mountains and rivers before their eyes.

The jagged peaks of Geumgangsan and rain falling over Inwangsan come alive through powerful brushstrokes.
Jingyeong Sansuhwa is the aesthetics of real landscape, perfected by Gyeomjae Jeong Seon — Korea's own vision of nature.
es.translated:
Se han aplicado los trazos vigorosos y la composición audaz de la jingyeong sansuhwa.
Abandonando el paisaje idealizado, se pinta directamente lo que se ve: las montañas reales ante los ojos.

Los picos afilados del monte Geumgang y la lluvia cayendo sobre el Inwangsan reviven con trazos poderosos.
Jingyeong Sansuhwa es la estética que Gyeomjae Jeong Seon perfeccionó: el verdadero paisaje de esta tierra.
es.back:
The vigorous strokes and bold composition of the jingyeong sansuhwa have been applied.
Abandoning the idealized landscape, it paints directly what is seen: the real mountains before the eyes.

The sharp peaks of Mt. Geumgang and the rain falling on the Inwangsan come alive in powerful strokes.
Jingyeong Sansuhwa is the aesthetic that Gyeomjae Jeong Seon perfected: the real landscape of this land.

es.original:
Gongbi's meticulous brushwork and luminous layered coloring have been applied to your image.
Fine brushes draw the outline first, then transparent colors are layered to build depth.

Flowers, birds, and figures are rendered strand by strand, captivating the imperial eye.
Gongbi is the pinnacle of East Asian fine painting — the height of color mastery, perfected by the court.
es.translated:
Se han aplicado el trazo preciso y el color transparente de la gongbi.
Primero se traza el contorno con un pincel fino, luego se superponen capas de color transparente para crear profundidad.

Flores, pájaros y figuras se pintan con minuciosa precisión, cautivando al emperador.
Gongbi es la cumbre de la miniatura oriental y la exquisitez cromática nacida en la corte.
es.back:
The precise stroke and transparent color of the gongbi have been applied.
First the outline is traced with a fine brush, then layers of transparent color are overlaid to create depth.

Flowers, birds and figures are painted with meticulous precision, captivating the emperor.
Gongbi is the pinnacle of oriental miniature and chromatic exquisiteness born at court.

es.original:
Ink Wash painting's fluid washes and contemplative empty space have been applied to your image.
Mountains, water, mist, and clouds are expressed through nothing but gradations of ink, and empty space becomes infinite.

The splashed-ink technique scatters ink like rain, capturing the vitality of nature.
Ink Wash painting is the purest form of East Asian painting — scholars transferred spirit, not form, onto silk.
es.translated:
Se han aplicado la difuminación de la tinta y la estética del vacío de la pintura de tinta.
Solo con las gradaciones de la tinta se expresan montañas, agua, niebla y nubes; el vacío se convierte en espacio infinito.

La técnica de tinta salpicada captura la fuerza vital de la naturaleza.
La quintaesencia de mil años de pintura oriental, donde el literato trasladó el espíritu al lienzo.
es.back:
Ink blurring and the aesthetics of the void of ink painting have been applied.
Only with the gradations of ink, mountains, water, fog and clouds are expressed; the void becomes infinite space.

The splattered ink technique captures the life force of nature.
The quintessence of a thousand years of oriental painting, where the literary man transferred the spirit to the canvas.

es.original:
Ukiyo-e's striking outlines and vivid flat colors have been applied to your image.
Bold outlines define the form, and flat planes of color fill within — pure graphic impact.

Like Hokusai's *The Great Wave off Kanagawa*, a split second of nature's fury is carved into a single impression.
Ukiyo-e is the vision that traveled from East to West, inspiring the Impressionists to see art anew.
es.translated:
Se han aplicado los contornos potentes y los planos de color del ukiyo-e.
Líneas audaces definen la forma y el interior se llena de áreas de color plano.

Como La Gran Ola de Kanagawa de Hokusai, un instante de dinamismo queda grabado en una sola plancha.
Ukiyo-e es la mirada que cruzó de Oriente a Occidente, inspirando a los impresionistas.
es.back:
The powerful contours and color planes of ukiyo-e have been applied.
Bold lines define the form and the interior is filled with areas of flat color.

Like Hokusai's The Great Wave of Kanagawa, an instant of dynamism is recorded on a single plate.
Ukiyo-e is the look that crossed from East to West, inspiring the Impressionists.

es.original:
Rinpa's gold leaf decoration and bold composition have been applied to your image.
Pigment is laid over gold leaf, with colors pooled layer upon layer to create natural texture.

Like Ogata Korin's *Irises Screen*, vibrant nature blooms upon a field of gold.
Rinpa, born from aristocratic taste and inspiring Art Nouveau — the essence of Japanese decorative painting.
es.translated:
Se han aplicado la decoración en pan de oro y la composición audaz de la rinpa.
Sobre el pan de oro se depositan pigmentos y se dejan fluir capas de color para crear texturas naturales.

Como los Lirios de Ogata Kōrin, una naturaleza espléndida florece sobre el dorado.
Rinpa es la quintaesencia de la pintura decorativa japonesa, nacida del gusto aristocrático e inspiración del Art Nouveau.
es.back:
Gold leaf decoration and the bold composition of the rinpa have been applied.
Pigments are deposited on the gold leaf and layers of color are allowed to flow to create natural textures.

Like the Kōrin Ogata Lilies, a splendid nature blooms on the gilding.
Rinpa is the quintessential Japanese decorative painting, born of aristocratic taste and Art Nouveau inspiration.

es.original:
Korean traditional brushwork and the beauty of empty space have been applied to your image.
Scholars painted with ink gradations, while common folk painted with vivid color — both giving life to their world.

Empty space speaks, and spirit flows through the brush tip — the aesthetics of Korean painting.
Korean traditional painting, represented by Minhwa, Pungsokdo, and Jingyeong Sansuhwa, is art that blossomed over 500 years of Joseon. aesthetics, from Minhwa to Jingyeong Sansuhwa.
es.translated:
Se han aplicado el trazo y la estética del vacío de la pintura tradicional coreana.
Los letrados pintaban con tinta; el pueblo, con color — cada uno expresando la vida a su manera.

Un arte donde el vacío habla y el pincel alberga el espíritu: esa es la estética coreana.
La pintura tradicional coreana, representada por minhwa, pungsokdo y jingyeong sansuhwa, es un arte que floreció durante 500 años de Joseon.
es.back:
The stroke and aesthetics of the emptiness of traditional Korean painting have been applied.
The scholars painted with ink, the people with color - each expressing life in their own way.

An art where emptiness speaks and the brush holds the spirit: that is the Korean aesthetic.
Traditional Korean painting, represented by minhwa, pungsokdo and jingyeong sansuhwa, is an art that flourished during 500 years of Joseon.

es.original:
Chinese traditional ink and color harmony have been applied to your image.
A single brushstroke raises mountains, and a single empty space conjures mist.

The literati's spirit and the court's mastery coexist in Chinese painting.
Chinese traditional painting, flowing through Gongbi and Ink Wash, is a vital wellspring of over a millennium of East Asian art tradition.
es.translated:
Se han aplicado la armonía de tinta y color de la pintura tradicional china.
Con una sola gradación de tinta se levantan montañas; con un solo vacío se hace brotar la niebla.

El espíritu del literato y la técnica cortesana coexisten: eso es la pintura china.
La fuente milenaria de la pintura oriental que fluye a través de gongbi y tinta.
es.back:
The harmony of ink and color of traditional Chinese painting has been applied.
With a single gradation of ink, mountains are raised; with a single vacuum, mist is brought forth.

The spirit of the litterateur and the courtly technique coexist: that is Chinese painting.
The millenary source of oriental painting that flows through gongbi and ink.

es.original:
Japanese traditional outlines and decorative color planes have been applied to your image.
Bold outlines and splendid coloring over gold leaf capture beauty in distinct ways.

Prints born from Edo popular culture and decorative painting of the court coexist in Japanese art.
Japanese traditional painting, born in streets and courts, crossed the ocean and profoundly influenced Western art.
es.translated:
Se han aplicado los contornos y los planos decorativos de la pintura tradicional japonesa.
Contornos audaces y colores brillantes sobre pan de oro graban la belleza.

Un arte donde los grabados populares de Edo y la pintura decorativa cortesana coexisten.
La pintura tradicional japonesa, nacida en las calles y las cortes, cruzó el mar e influyó profundamente en el arte occidental.
es.back:
The contours and decorative planes of traditional Japanese painting have been applied.
Bold contours and bright colors on gold leaf engrave the beauty.

An art where Edo folk prints and courtly decorative painting coexist.
Traditional Japanese painting, born in the streets and courts, crossed the sea and deeply influenced Western art.
