Ink Wash painting's fluid washes and contemplative empty space have been applied to your image.
Mountains, water, mist, and clouds are expressed through nothing but gradations of ink, and empty space becomes infinite.

The splashed-ink technique scatters ink like rain, capturing the vitality of nature.
Ink Wash painting is the purest form of East Asian painting — scholars transferred spirit, not form, onto silk.
es.translated:
Se han aplicado la difuminación de la tinta y la estética del vacío de la pintura de tinta.
Solo con las gradaciones de la tinta se expresan montañas, agua, niebla y nubes; el vacío se convierte en espacio infinito.

La técnica de tinta salpicada captura la fuerza vital de la naturaleza.
La quintaesencia de mil años de pintura oriental, donde el literato trasladó el espíritu al lienzo.
es.back:
Ink blurring and the aesthetics of the void of ink painting have been applied.
Only with the gradations of ink, mountains, water, fog and clouds are expressed; the void becomes infinite space.

The splattered ink technique captures the life force of nature.
The quintessence of a thousand years of oriental painting, where the literary man transferred the spirit to the canvas.

es.original:
Ukiyo-e's striking outlines and vivid flat colors have been applied to your image.
Bold outlines define the form, and flat planes of color fill within — pure graphic impact.

Like Hokusai's *The Great Wave off Kanagawa*, a split second of nature's fury is carved into a single impression.
Ukiyo-e is the vision that traveled from East to West, inspiring the Impressionists to see art anew.
es.translated:
Se han aplicado los contornos potentes y los planos de color del ukiyo-e.
Líneas audaces definen la forma y el interior se llena de áreas de color plano.

Como La Gran Ola de Kanagawa de Hokusai, un instante de dinamismo queda grabado en una sola plancha.
Ukiyo-e es la mirada que cruzó de Oriente a Occidente, inspirando a los impresionistas.
es.back:
The powerful contours and color planes of ukiyo-e have been applied.
Bold lines define the form and the interior is filled with areas of flat color.

Like Hokusai's The Great Wave of Kanagawa, an instant of dynamism is recorded on a single plate.
Ukiyo-e is the look that crossed from East to West, inspiring the Impressionists.

es.original:
Rinpa's gold leaf decoration and bold composition have been applied to your image.
Pigment is laid over gold leaf, with colors pooled layer upon layer to create natural texture.

Like Ogata Korin's *Irises Screen*, vibrant nature blooms upon a field of gold.
Rinpa, born from aristocratic taste and inspiring Art Nouveau — the essence of Japanese decorative painting.
es.translated:
Se han aplicado la decoración en pan de oro y la composición audaz de la rinpa.
Sobre el pan de oro se depositan pigmentos y se dejan fluir capas de color para crear texturas naturales.

Como los Lirios de Ogata Kōrin, una naturaleza espléndida florece sobre el dorado.
Rinpa es la quintaesencia de la pintura decorativa japonesa, nacida del gusto aristocrático e inspiración del Art Nouveau.
es.back:
Gold leaf decoration and the bold composition of the rinpa have been applied.
Pigments are deposited on the gold leaf and layers of color are allowed to flow to create natural textures.

Like the Kōrin Ogata Lilies, a splendid nature blooms on the gilding.
Rinpa is the quintessential Japanese decorative painting, born of aristocratic taste and Art Nouveau inspiration.

es.original:
Korean traditional brushwork and the beauty of empty space have been applied to your image.
Scholars painted with ink gradations, while common folk painted with vivid color — both giving life to their world.

Empty space speaks, and spirit flows through the brush tip — the aesthetics of Korean painting.
Korean traditional painting, represented by Minhwa, Pungsokdo, and Jingyeong Sansuhwa, is art that blossomed over 500 years of Joseon. aesthetics, from Minhwa to Jingyeong Sansuhwa.
es.translated:
Se han aplicado el trazo y la estética del vacío de la pintura tradicional coreana.
Los letrados pintaban con tinta; el pueblo, con color — cada uno expresando la vida a su manera.

Un arte donde el vacío habla y el pincel alberga el espíritu: esa es la estética coreana.
La pintura tradicional coreana, representada por minhwa, pungsokdo y jingyeong sansuhwa, es un arte que floreció durante 500 años de Joseon.
es.back:
The stroke and aesthetics of the emptiness of traditional Korean painting have been applied.
The scholars painted with ink, the people with color - each expressing life in their own way.

An art where emptiness speaks and the brush holds the spirit: that is the Korean aesthetic.
Traditional Korean painting, represented by minhwa, pungsokdo and jingyeong sansuhwa, is an art that flourished during 500 years of Joseon.

es.original:
Chinese traditional ink and color harmony have been applied to your image.
A single brushstroke raises mountains, and a single empty space conjures mist.

The literati's spirit and the court's mastery coexist in Chinese painting.
Chinese traditional painting, flowing through Gongbi and Ink Wash, is a vital wellspring of over a millennium of East Asian art tradition.
es.translated:
Se han aplicado la armonía de tinta y color de la pintura tradicional china.
Con una sola gradación de tinta se levantan montañas; con un solo vacío se hace brotar la niebla.

El espíritu del literato y la técnica cortesana coexisten: eso es la pintura china.
La fuente milenaria de la pintura oriental que fluye a través de gongbi y tinta.
es.back:
The harmony of ink and color of traditional Chinese painting has been applied.
With a single gradation of ink, mountains are raised; with a single vacuum, mist is brought forth.

The spirit of the litterateur and the courtly technique coexist: that is Chinese painting.
The millenary source of oriental painting that flows through gongbi and ink.

es.original:
Japanese traditional outlines and decorative color planes have been applied to your image.
Bold outlines and splendid coloring over gold leaf capture beauty in distinct ways.

Prints born from Edo popular culture and decorative painting of the court coexist in Japanese art.
Japanese traditional painting, born in streets and courts, crossed the ocean and profoundly influenced Western art.
es.translated:
Se han aplicado los contornos y los planos decorativos de la pintura tradicional japonesa.
Contornos audaces y colores brillantes sobre pan de oro graban la belleza.

Un arte donde los grabados populares de Edo y la pintura decorativa cortesana coexisten.
La pintura tradicional japonesa, nacida en las calles y las cortes, cruzó el mar e influyó profundamente en el arte occidental.
es.back:
The contours and decorative planes of traditional Japanese painting have been applied.
Bold contours and bright colors on gold leaf engrave the beauty.

An art where Edo folk prints and courtly decorative painting coexist.
Traditional Japanese painting, born in the streets and courts, crossed the sea and deeply influenced Western art.

fr.original: Street prints and golden decorative art
fr.translated: Estampes populaires, décors dorés de cour
Les vœux du peuple en images
Les montagnes de Joseon vues de ses propres yeux
fr.back: Joseon's mountains seen with his own eyes

fr.translated: Le paysage de l'esprit en encre
Le monde flottant gravé sur bois
fr.back: The floating world engraved on wood

fr.original: Decorative beauty bloomed on gold leaf

Korean painters learned Chinese brushwork, but what they painted was their own land and people.
Minhwa wished for fortune through magpies and tigers, while Pungsokdo captured the daily lives of common folk.
Jingyeong Sansuhwa depicted not idealized landscapes, but the real mountains and rivers before the painter's eyes.

Empty space speaks, and spirit flows through the brush tip — that is the art of Korean traditional painting.
Wishes, daily life, and landscapes captured by the brush — meet Korean painting, bloomed from its own soil.
fr.translated:
Les peintres de Joseon apprirent les techniques chinoises, mais ce qu'ils peignirent, ce fut leur propre terre et leur peuple.
La minhwa invoquait la bonne fortune avec des pies et des tigres ; la pungsokdo enregistrait la vie du peuple.
La jingyeong sansuhwa ne peignait pas des paysages idéalisés, mais les montagnes réelles qui s'étendaient devant leurs yeux.

Un art où le vide parle et le pinceau abrite l'esprit : telle est la peinture traditionnelle coréenne.
Vœux, quotidien et montagnes captés par le pinceau, éclos comme l'essence de cette terre.
fr.back:
Joseon painters learned Chinese techniques, but what they painted was their own land and people.
The minhwa invoked good fortune with magpies and tigers; the pungsokdo recorded the life of the people.
The jingyeong sansuhwa painted not idealized landscapes, but the real mountains that lay before their eyes.

An art where the void speaks and the brush shelters the spirit: such is traditional Korean painting.
Vows, daily life and mountains captured by the brush, blossoming like the essence of this land.

fr.original:
Before a landscape scroll, Chinese literati read the world through ink.
Ink Wash painting raised mountains with gradations of ink alone and conjured mist through empty space.
Gongbi rendered every last petal with meticulous precision, offered to the emperor.

The wellspring of East Asian art, flowing for over a millennium, is Chinese traditional painting.
Meet the depth of a thousand years, forged in ink and color.
fr.translated:
Devant un seul paysage peint, le lettré chinois lisait le monde entier.
La peinture à l'encre dressait les montagnes par de simples dégradés d'encre et faisait naître la brume avec le vide.
La gongbi peignait jusqu'au dernier pétale avec une précision minutieuse pour l'offrir à l'empereur.

La source millénaire de la peinture orientale est la peinture traditionnelle chinoise.
Mille ans tissés d'encre et de couleur : la racine de toute la peinture de l'Est.
fr.back:
In front of a single painted landscape, the Chinese scholar read the whole world.
Ink painting erected mountains with simple gradations of ink, and brought mist to life with emptiness.
The gongbi painted every last petal with meticulous precision, offering it to the emperor.

The age-old source of Oriental painting is traditional Chinese painting.
A thousand years woven of ink and color: the root of all Eastern painting.

fr.original:
In Edo’s streets, woodblock prints flourished; in Kyoto’s courts, decorative painting blossomed.
Ukiyo-e carved actors, beauties, and landscapes into woodblocks sold to the common people.
Rinpa painted irises and wind gods over gold leaf, captivating the eyes of the aristocracy.

Popular sensibility and courtly splendor coexisting — that is the art of Japanese traditional painting.
Born in streets and courts, crossing the ocean — meet Japanese painting that shook the Western art world.
fr.translated:
Dans les rues d'Edo fleurirent les estampes ; dans les cours de Kyoto, la peinture décorative.
L'ukiyo-e gravait acteurs, beautés et paysages célèbres sur des blocs de bois pour le peuple.
La rinpa peignait des iris et des dieux du vent sur feuille d'or, captivant l'aristocratie.

Un art où la sensibilité populaire et la splendeur de la cour coexistent : telle est la peinture traditionnelle japonaise.
La peinture traditionnelle japonaise, née dans les rues et les cours, traversa les mers et influença profondément l'art occidental.
fr.back:
In the streets of Edo, prints flourished; in the courtyards of Kyoto, decorative painting.
Ukiyo-e engraved actors, beauties and famous landscapes on wooden blocks for the common people.
Rinpa painted irises and wind gods on gold leaf, captivating the aristocracy.

An art where popular sensibility and courtly splendor coexist: this is traditional Japanese painting.
Traditional Japanese painting, born in the streets and courtyards, crossed the seas and profoundly influenced Western art.

fr.original:
Minhwa's vibrant palette and free-spirited composition have been applied to your image.
Painted in the five cardinal colors (blue, red, yellow, white, black) and arranged freely without perspective.

Peonies symbolize wealth, carp represent success, and tigers ward off evil.
Minhwa is Joseon folk art — hung on folding screens in every home, each painting carrying a wish.
fr.translated:
Les couleurs vives et la composition libre de la minhwa ont été appliquées.
Peinte avec les cinq couleurs cardinales (bleu, rouge, jaune, blanc, noir) et disposée librement sans perspective.

La pivoine symbolise la richesse, la carpe l'ascension sociale et le tigre chasse les mauvais esprits.
Minhwa est art populaire de Joseon qui ornait les paravents de chaque foyer, porteur de vœux et d'espérances.
fr.back:
The bright colors and free composition of the minhwa were applied.
Painted with the five cardinal colors (blue, red, yellow, white, black) and freely arranged without perspective.

The peony symbolizes wealth, the carp social ascension and the tiger drives away evil spirits.
Minhwa is a popular Joseon art that adorned screens in every home, conveying wishes and hopes.

fr.original:
Pungsokdo's swift brushwork and restrained coloring have been applied to your image.
Fine-brush light-wash technique captures gestures and expressions, while empty space opens up the scene.

Wrestling men, women doing laundry, children dozing in village schools — everyday Joseon life comes alive.
Pungsokdo is Korean realism, brought to bloom by Kim Hong-do and Shin Yun-bok through the tip of a brush.
fr.translated:
Les traits rapides et la couleur sobre de la pungsokdo ont été appliqués.
La technique du pinceau fin et de la couleur légère capte le mouvement et les expressions, laissant de l'espace avec le vide.

Lutteurs, lavandières, un enfant endormi à l'école — le quotidien de Joseon prend vie.
Pungsokdo est le réalisme coréen que Kim Hong-do et Shin Yun-bok firent fleurir à la pointe du pinceau.
fr.back:
The quick strokes and sober color of pungsokdo have been applied.
The technique of fine brushwork and light color captures movement and expression, leaving space with emptiness.

Wrestlers, washerwomen, a child asleep at school - Joseon's everyday life comes to life.
Pungsokdo is the Korean realism that Kim Hong-do and Shin Yun-bok brought to life with the tip of their brush.

fr.original:
Jingyeong Sansuhwa's vigorous texture strokes and bold composition have been applied to your image.
Breaking free from idealized landscapes, painters sketched the real mountains and rivers before their eyes.

The jagged peaks of Geumgangsan and rain falling over Inwangsan come alive through powerful brushstrokes.
Jingyeong Sansuhwa is the aesthetics of real landscape, perfected by Gyeomjae Jeong Seon — Korea's own vision of nature.
fr.translated:
Les traits vigoureux et la composition audacieuse de la jingyeong sansuhwa ont été appliqués.
Abandonnant le paysage idéalisé, on peint directement ce que l'on voit : les montagnes réelles devant les yeux.

Les pics acérés du mont Geumgang et la pluie tombant sur l'Inwangsan revivent à travers des traits puissants.
Jingyeong Sansuhwa est l'esthétique que Gyeomjae Jeong Seon perfectionna : le vrai paysage de cette terre.
fr.back:
The vigorous strokes and bold composition of the jingyeong sansuhwa were applied.
Abandoning the idealized landscape, we paint directly what we see: the real mountains before our eyes.

The sharp peaks of Mount Geumgang and the rain falling on Inwangsan come to life through powerful strokes.
Jingyeong Sansuhwa is the aesthetic that Gyeomjae Jeong Seon perfected: the true landscape of this land.

fr.original:
Gongbi's meticulous brushwork and luminous layered coloring have been applied to your image.
Fine brushes draw the outline first, then transparent colors are layered to build depth.

Flowers, birds, and figures are rendered strand by strand, captivating the imperial eye.
Gongbi is the pinnacle of East Asian fine painting — the height of color mastery, perfected by the court.
fr.translated:
Le trait précis et la couleur transparente de la gongbi ont été appliqués.
On trace d'abord le contour au pinceau fin, puis on superpose des couches de couleur transparente pour créer la profondeur.

Fleurs, oiseaux et figures sont peints avec une précision minutieuse, captivant l'empereur.
Gongbi est le sommet de la miniature orientale et l'exquise subtilité chromatique née à la cour.
fr.back:
The precise line and transparent color of the gongbi have been applied.
First, the outline is traced with a fine brush, then layers of transparent color are superimposed to create depth.

Flowers, birds and figures are painted with meticulous precision, captivating the emperor.
Gongbi is the pinnacle of oriental miniature and the exquisite chromatic subtlety born at court.

fr.original:
Ink Wash painting's fluid washes and contemplative empty space have been applied to your image.
Mountains, water, mist, and clouds are expressed through nothing but gradations of ink, and empty space becomes infinite.

The splashed-ink technique scatters ink like rain, capturing the vitality of nature.
Ink Wash painting is the purest form of East Asian painting — scholars transferred spirit, not form, onto silk.
fr.translated:
La diffusion de l'encre et l'esthétique du vide de la peinture à l'encre ont été appliquées.
Avec les seuls dégradés de l'encre, on exprime montagnes, eau, brume et nuages ; le vide devient un espace infini.

La technique de l'encre éclaboussée capte la force vitale de la nature.
La quintessence de mille ans de peinture orientale, où le lettré transposa l'esprit sur la toile.
fr.back:
The diffusion of ink and the empty aesthetics of ink painting were applied.
With ink gradations alone, mountains, water, mist and clouds are expressed; emptiness becomes infinite space.

The splashed ink technique captures the vital force of nature.
The quintessence of a thousand years of oriental painting, where the scholar transposed the spirit onto the canvas.

fr.original:
Ukiyo-e's striking outlines and vivid flat colors have been applied to your image.
Bold outlines define the form, and flat planes of color fill within — pure graphic impact.

Like Hokusai's *The Great Wave off Kanagawa*, a split second of nature's fury is carved into a single impression.
Ukiyo-e is the vision that traveled from East to West, inspiring the Impressionists to see art anew.
fr.translated:
Les contours puissants et les aplats de couleur de l'ukiyo-e ont été appliqués.
Des lignes audacieuses définissent la forme et l'intérieur est rempli de zones de couleur plate.

Comme La Grande Vague de Kanagawa de Hokusai, un instant de dynamisme est gravé sur une seule planche.
Ukiyo-e est le regard qui traversa d'Orient en Occident, inspirant les impressionnistes.
fr.back:
The powerful contours and flat colors of ukiyo-e have been applied.
Bold lines define the shape, and the interior is filled with areas of flat color.

Like Hokusai's The Great Wave of Kanagawa, an instant of dynamism is etched onto a single plate.
Ukiyo-e is the gaze that crossed from East to West, inspiring the Impressionists.

Rinpa's gold leaf decoration and bold composition have been applied to your image.
Pigment is laid over gold leaf, with colors pooled layer upon layer to create natural texture.

Like Ogata Korin's *Irises Screen*, vibrant nature blooms upon a field of gold.
Rinpa, born from aristocratic taste and inspiring Art Nouveau — the essence of Japanese decorative painting.

La décoration sur feuille d'or et la composition audacieuse de la rinpa ont été appliquées.
Sur la feuille d'or, on dépose des pigments et on laisse couler des couches de couleur pour créer des textures naturelles.

Comme les Iris d'Ogata Kōrin, une nature splendide s'épanouit sur le doré.
Rinpa est la quintessence de la peinture décorative japonaise, née du goût aristocratique et source d'inspiration de l'Art nouveau.
fr.back:
Gold leaf decoration and bold rinpa composition were applied.
Pigments are deposited on gold leaf, and layers of color are allowed to flow to create natural textures.

Like the irises of Ogata Kōrin, splendid nature blooms on the gold.
Rinpa is the quintessence of Japanese decorative painting, born of aristocratic taste and a source of inspiration for Art Nouveau.

Empty space speaks, and spirit flows through the brush tip — the aesthetics of Korean painting.
Korean traditional painting, represented by Minhwa, Pungsokdo, and Jingyeong Sansuhwa, is art that blossomed over 500 years of Joseon. aesthetics, from Minhwa to Jingyeong Sansuhwa.

Le trait et l'esthétique du vide de la peinture traditionnelle coréenne ont été appliqués.
Les lettrés peignaient à l'encre ; le peuple, en couleur — chacun exprimant la vie à sa manière.

Un art où le vide parle et le pinceau abrite l'esprit : telle est l'esthétique coréenne.

L'esprit du lettré et la technique de la cour coexistent : telle est la peinture chinoise.

Minhwa is Joseon folk art — hung on folding screens in every home, each painting carrying a wish.
fr.translated:
Les couleurs vives et la composition libre de la minhwa ont été appliquées.
Peinte avec les cinq couleurs cardinales (bleu, rouge, jaune, blanc, noir) et disposée librement sans perspective.

La pivoine symbolise la richesse, la carpe l'ascension sociale et le tigre chasse les mauvais esprits.
Minhwa est art populaire de Joseon qui ornait les paravents de chaque foyer, porteur de vœux et d'espérances.
fr.back:
The bright colors and free composition of the minhwa were applied.
Painted with the five cardinal colors (blue, red, yellow, white, black) and freely arranged without perspective.

The peony symbolizes wealth, the carp social ascension and the tiger drives away evil spirits.
Minhwa is a popular Joseon art that adorned screens in every home, conveying wishes and hopes.

fr.original:
Pungsokdo's swift brushwork and restrained coloring have been applied to your image.
Fine-brush light-wash technique captures gestures and expressions, while empty space opens up the scene.

Wrestling men, women doing laundry, children dozing in village schools — everyday Joseon life comes alive.
Pungsokdo is Korean realism, brought to bloom by Kim Hong-do and Shin Yun-bok through the tip of a brush.
fr.translated:
Les traits rapides et la couleur sobre de la pungsokdo ont été appliqués.
La technique du pinceau fin et de la couleur légère capte le mouvement et les expressions, laissant de l'espace avec le vide.

Lutteurs, lavandières, un enfant endormi à l'école — le quotidien de Joseon prend vie.
Pungsokdo est le réalisme coréen que Kim Hong-do et Shin Yun-bok firent fleurir à la pointe du pinceau.
fr.back:
The quick strokes and sober color of pungsokdo have been applied.
The technique of fine brushwork and light color captures movement and expression, leaving space with emptiness.

Wrestlers, washerwomen, a child asleep at school - Joseon's everyday life comes to life.
Pungsokdo is the Korean realism that Kim Hong-do and Shin Yun-bok brought to life with the tip of their brush.

fr.original:
Jingyeong Sansuhwa's vigorous texture strokes and bold composition have been applied to your image.
Breaking free from idealized landscapes, painters sketched the real mountains and rivers before their eyes.

The jagged peaks of Geumgangsan and rain falling over Inwangsan come alive through powerful brushstrokes.
Jingyeong Sansuhwa is the aesthetics of real landscape, perfected by Gyeomjae Jeong Seon — Korea's own vision of nature.
fr.translated:
Les traits vigoureux et la composition audacieuse de la jingyeong sansuhwa ont été appliqués.
Abandonnant le paysage idéalisé, on peint directement ce que l'on voit : les montagnes réelles devant les yeux.

Les pics acérés du mont Geumgang et la pluie tombant sur l'Inwangsan revivent à travers des traits puissants.
Jingyeong Sansuhwa est l'esthétique que Gyeomjae Jeong Seon perfectionna : le vrai paysage de cette terre.
fr.back:
The vigorous strokes and bold composition of the jingyeong sansuhwa were applied.
Abandoning the idealized landscape, we paint directly what we see: the real mountains before our eyes.

The sharp peaks of Mount Geumgang and the rain falling on Inwangsan come to life through powerful strokes.
Jingyeong Sansuhwa is the aesthetic that Gyeomjae Jeong Seon perfected: the true landscape of this land.

fr.original:
Gongbi's meticulous brushwork and luminous layered coloring have been applied to your image.
Fine brushes draw the outline first, then transparent colors are layered to build depth.

Flowers, birds, and figures are rendered strand by strand, captivating the imperial eye.
Gongbi is the pinnacle of East Asian fine painting — the height of color mastery, perfected by the court.
fr.translated:
Le trait précis et la couleur transparente de la gongbi ont été appliqués.
On trace d'abord le contour au pinceau fin, puis on superpose des couches de couleur transparente pour créer la profondeur.

Fleurs, oiseaux et figures sont peints avec une précision minutieuse, captivant l'empereur.
Gongbi est le sommet de la miniature orientale et l'exquise subtilité chromatique née à la cour.
fr.back:
The precise line and transparent color of the gongbi have been applied.
First, the outline is traced with a fine brush, then layers of transparent color are superimposed to create depth.

Flowers, birds and figures are painted with meticulous precision, captivating the emperor.
Gongbi is the pinnacle of oriental miniature and the exquisite chromatic subtlety born at court.

fr.original:
Ink Wash painting's fluid washes and contemplative empty space have been applied to your image.
Mountains, water, mist, and clouds are expressed through nothing but gradations of ink, and empty space becomes infinite.

The splashed-ink technique scatters ink like rain, capturing the vitality of nature.
Ink Wash painting is the purest form of East Asian painting — scholars transferred spirit, not form, onto silk.
fr.translated:
La diffusion de l'encre et l'esthétique du vide de la peinture à l'encre ont été appliquées.
Avec les seuls dégradés de l'encre, on exprime montagnes, eau, brume et nuages ; le vide devient un espace infini.

La technique de l'encre éclaboussée capte la force vitale de la nature.
La quintessence de mille ans de peinture orientale, où le lettré transposa l'esprit sur la toile.
fr.back:
The diffusion of ink and the empty aesthetics of ink painting were applied.
With ink gradations alone, mountains, water, mist and clouds are expressed; emptiness becomes infinite space.

The splashed ink technique captures the vital force of nature.
The quintessence of a thousand years of oriental painting, where the scholar transposed the spirit onto the canvas.

fr.original:
Ukiyo-e's striking outlines and vivid flat colors have been applied to your image.
Bold outlines define the form, and flat planes of color fill within — pure graphic impact.

Like Hokusai's *The Great Wave off Kanagawa*, a split second of nature's fury is carved into a single impression.
Ukiyo-e is the vision that traveled from East to West, inspiring the Impressionists to see art anew.
fr.translated:
Les contours puissants et les aplats de couleur de l'ukiyo-e ont été appliqués.
Des lignes audacieuses définissent la forme et l'intérieur est rempli de zones de couleur plate.

Comme La Grande Vague de Kanagawa de Hokusai, un instant de dynamisme est gravé sur une seule planche.
Ukiyo-e est le regard qui traversa d'Orient en Occident, inspirant les impressionnistes.
fr.back:
The powerful contours and flat colors of ukiyo-e have been applied.
Bold lines define the shape, and the interior is filled with areas of flat color.

Like Hokusai's The Great Wave of Kanagawa, an instant of dynamism is etched onto a single plate.
Ukiyo-e is the gaze that crossed from East to West, inspiring the Impressionists.

fr.original:
Rinpa's gold leaf decoration and bold composition have been applied to your image.
Pigment is laid over gold leaf, with colors pooled layer upon layer to create natural texture.

Like Ogata Korin's *Irises Screen*, vibrant nature blooms upon a field of gold.
Rinpa, born from aristocratic taste and inspiring Art Nouveau — the essence of Japanese decorative painting.
fr.translated:
La décoration sur feuille d'or et la composition audacieuse de la rinpa ont été appliquées.
Sur la feuille d'or, on dépose des pigments et on laisse couler des couches de couleur pour créer des textures naturelles.

Comme les Iris d'Ogata Kōrin, une nature splendide s'épanouit sur le doré.
Rinpa est la quintessence de la peinture décorative japonaise, née du goût aristocratique et source d'inspiration de l'Art nouveau.
fr.back:
Gold leaf decoration and bold rinpa composition were applied.
Pigments are deposited on gold leaf, and layers of color are allowed to flow to create natural textures.

Like the irises of Ogata Kōrin, splendid nature blooms on the gold.
Rinpa is the quintessence of Japanese decorative painting, born of aristocratic taste and a source of inspiration for Art Nouveau.

fr.original:
Korean traditional brushwork and the beauty of empty space have been applied to your image.
Scholars painted with ink gradations, while common folk painted with vivid color — both giving life to their world.

Empty space speaks, and spirit flows through the brush tip — the aesthetics of Korean painting.
Korean traditional painting, represented by Minhwa, Pungsokdo, and Jingyeong Sansuhwa, is art that blossomed over 500 years of Joseon. aesthetics, from Minhwa to Jingyeong Sansuhwa.
fr.translated:
Le trait et l'esthétique du vide de la peinture traditionnelle coréenne ont été appliqués.
Les lettrés peignaient à l'encre ; le peuple, en couleur — chacun exprimant la vie à sa manière.

Un art où le vide parle et le pinceau abrite l'esprit : telle est l'esthétique coréenne.
La peinture traditionnelle coréenne, représentée par minhwa, pungsokdo et jingyeong sansuhwa, est un art qui a fleuri pendant 500 ans de Joseon.
fr.back:
The line and void aesthetics of traditional Korean painting were applied.
The scholars painted in ink; the people, in color - each expressing life in their own way.

An art where the void speaks and the brush shelters the spirit: such is the Korean aesthetic.
Traditional Korean painting, represented by minhwa, pungsokdo and jingyeong sansuhwa, is an art that flourished during 500 years of Joseon.

fr.original:
Chinese traditional ink and color harmony have been applied to your image.
A single brushstroke raises mountains, and a single empty space conjures mist.

The literati's spirit and the court's mastery coexist in Chinese painting.
Chinese traditional painting, flowing through Gongbi and Ink Wash, is a vital wellspring of over a millennium of East Asian art tradition.
fr.translated:
L'harmonie de l'encre et de la couleur de la peinture traditionnelle chinoise a été appliquée.
D'un seul dégradé d'encre on dresse les montagnes ; d'un seul vide on fait naître la brume.

L'esprit du lettré et la technique de la cour coexistent : telle est la peinture chinoise.
La source millénaire de la peinture orientale qui coule à travers gongbi et encre.
fr.back:
The harmony of ink and color of traditional Chinese painting has been applied.
A single gradation of ink raises mountains; a single void gives birth to mist.

The spirit of the scholar and the technique of the court coexist: such is Chinese painting.
The age-old source of Oriental painting, flowing through gongbi and ink.

fr.original:
Japanese traditional outlines and decorative color planes have been applied to your image.
Bold outlines and splendid coloring over gold leaf capture beauty in distinct ways.

Prints born from Edo popular culture and decorative painting of the court coexist in Japanese art.
Japanese traditional painting, born in streets and courts, crossed the ocean and profoundly influenced Western art.
fr.translated:
Les contours et les aplats décoratifs de la peinture traditionnelle japonaise ont été appliqués.
Des contours audacieux et des couleurs brillantes sur feuille d'or gravent la beauté.

Un art où les estampes populaires d'Edo et la peinture décorative de cour coexistent.
La peinture traditionnelle japonaise, née dans les rues et les cours, traversa les mers et influença profondément l'art occidental.
fr.back:
The contours and decorative flat tints of traditional Japanese painting have been applied.
Bold contours and brilliant colors on gold leaf etch beauty.

An art form where popular Edo prints and courtly decorative painting coexist.
Traditional Japanese painting, born in the streets and courtyards, crossed the seas and profoundly influenced Western art.

id.original:
Korean painters learned Chinese brushwork, but what they painted was their own land and people.
Minhwa wished for fortune through magpies and tigers, while Pungsokdo captured the daily lives of common folk.
Jingyeong Sansuhwa depicted not idealized landscapes, but the real mountains and rivers before the painter's eyes.

Empty space speaks, and spirit flows through the brush tip — that is the art of Korean traditional painting.
Wishes, daily life, and landscapes captured by the brush — meet Korean painting, bloomed from its own soil.
id.translated:
Para pelukis Joseon mempelajari teknik Tiongkok, tetapi yang mereka lukis adalah tanah dan rakyat mereka sendiri.
Minhwa memanggil keberuntungan dengan burung murai dan harimau; pungsokdo mencatat kehidupan rakyat.
Jingyeong sansuhwa tidak melukis pemandangan ideal, melainkan gunung nyata yang terbentang di depan mata.

Seni di mana kekosongan berbicara dan kuas menyimpan jiwa: itulah seni lukis tradisional Korea.
Harapan, keseharian, dan gunung yang ditangkap oleh kuas, mekar sebagai esensi tanah ini.
id.back:
Joseon painters studied Chinese techniques, but what they painted was their own land and people.
Minhwa summoned good fortune with magpies and tigers; pungsokdo recorded the lives of the people.
Jingyeong sansuhwa did not paint idealized landscapes, but real mountains that unfolded before the eyes.

An art where the void speaks and the brush holds the soul: that is traditional Korean painting.
Hope, daily life, and the mountain captured by the brush, bloom as the essence of this land.

id.original:
Before a landscape scroll, Chinese literati read the world through ink.
Ink Wash painting raised mountains with gradations of ink alone and conjured mist through empty space.
Gongbi rendered every last petal with meticulous precision, offered to the emperor.

The wellspring of East Asian art, flowing for over a millennium, is Chinese traditional painting.
Meet the depth of a thousand years, forged in ink and color.
id.translated:
Di hadapan satu pemandangan yang dilukis, seorang sarjana Tiongkok membaca seluruh dunia.
Lukisan tinta mendirikan gunung hanya dengan gradasi tinta dan melahirkan kabut dari kekosongan.
Gongbi melukis hingga kelopak terakhir dengan presisi cermat untuk dipersembahkan kepada kaisar.

Sumber seribu tahun seni lukis oriental adalah seni lukis tradisional Tiongkok.
Seribu tahun yang ditenun dari tinta dan warna: akar seluruh seni lukis Timur.
id.back:
In the presence of one painted scene, a Chinese scholar reads the entire world.
Ink paintings erect mountains with just a gradation of ink and give birth to mist from emptiness.
Gongbi painted to the last petal with meticulous precision to present to the emperor.

The source of the thousand years of oriental painting is traditional Chinese painting.
A thousand years woven from ink and color: the root of all Eastern painting.

id.original:
In Edo’s streets, woodblock prints flourished; in Kyoto’s courts, decorative painting blossomed.
Ukiyo-e carved actors, beauties, and landscapes into woodblocks sold to the common people.
Rinpa painted irises and wind gods over gold leaf, captivating the eyes of the aristocracy.

Popular sensibility and courtly splendor coexisting — that is the art of Japanese traditional painting.
Born in streets and courts, crossing the ocean — meet Japanese painting that shook the Western art world.
id.translated:
Di jalanan Edo bermekaran cetakan ukiyo-e; di istana Kyoto, lukisan dekoratif.
Ukiyo-e mengukir aktor, kecantikan, dan pemandangan terkenal di atas balok kayu untuk rakyat.
Rinpa melukis iris dan dewa angin di atas lembaran emas, memikat kaum aristokrat.

Seni di mana sensibilitas rakyat dan kemegahan istana berdampingan: itulah seni lukis tradisional Jepang.
Lahir di jalanan dan istana, ia menyeberangi lautan dan mengguncang Barat.
id.back:
On the streets of Edo bloomed ukiyo-e prints; in the palaces of Kyoto, decorative paintings.
Ukiyo-e carved famous actors, beauties, and scenes on wooden blocks for the people.
Rinpa painted irises and wind gods on gold leaf, enchanting the aristocracy.

An art where folk sensibility and courtly splendor coexist: that is traditional Japanese painting.
Born in the streets and palaces, it crossed the seas and shook the West.

Peonies symbolize wealth, carp represent success, and tigers ward off evil.
Minhwa is Joseon folk art — hung on folding screens in every home, each painting carrying a wish.

Peoni melambangkan kekayaan, ikan mas melambangkan keberhasilan, dan harimau mengusir roh jahat.
Minhwa adalah seni rakyat Joseon yang menghiasi layar lipat setiap rumah, membawa harapan dan doa.
id.back:

Peonies symbolize wealth, goldfish symbolize success, and tigers ward off evil spirits.
Minhwa is a Joseon folk art that adorns the folding screens of every home, carrying hopes and prayers.

Pungsokdo adalah realisme Korea yang Kim Hong-do dan Shin Yun-bok mekarkan di ujung kuas.

Wrestlers, laundresses, children asleep at school - Joseon daily life comes alive.
Pungsokdo is Korean realism that Kim Hong-do and Shin Yun-bok bloom at the tip of the brush.

Jingyeong Sansuhwa adalah estetika yang Gyeomjae Jeong Seon sempurnakan: pemandangan sejati tanah ini.
id.back:
The strong strokes and bold compositions of jingyeong sansuhwa have been applied.

The sharp peak of Mount Geumgang and the rain falling on Inwangsan come to life through strong strokes.

The harmony of ink and color of traditional Chinese painting has been applied.
With one gradation of ink, a mountain stands; with one void, mist is born.

The scholar's soul and court technique coexist: that is Chinese painting.
A thousand-year source of oriental painting that flows through gongbi and ink.

id.original:
Japanese traditional outlines and decorative color planes have been applied to your image.
Bold outlines and splendid coloring over gold leaf capture beauty in distinct ways.

Prints born from Edo popular culture and decorative painting of the court coexist in Japanese art.
Japanese traditional painting, born in streets and courts, crossed the ocean and profoundly influenced Western art.
id.translated:
Kontur dan bidang warna dekoratif seni lukis tradisional Jepang telah diterapkan.
Kontur berani dan warna cerah di atas lembaran emas mengukir keindahan.

Seni di mana cetakan rakyat Edo dan lukisan dekoratif istana berdampingan.
Lahir di jalanan dan istana, ia menyeberangi lautan dan mengguncang Barat.
id.back:

id.original:

Jingyeong Sansuhwa depicted not idealized landscapes, but the real mountains and rivers before the painter's eyes.

Empty space speaks, and spirit flows through the brush tip — that is the art of Korean traditional painting.
Wishes, daily life, and landscapes captured by the brush — meet Korean painting, bloomed from its own soil.
id.translated:
Para pelukis Joseon mempelajari teknik Tiongkok, tetapi yang mereka lukis adalah tanah dan rakyat mereka sendiri.
Minhwa memanggil keberuntungan dengan burung murai dan harimau; pungsokdo mencatat kehidupan rakyat.
Jingyeong sansuhwa tidak melukis pemandangan ideal, melainkan gunung nyata yang terbentang di depan mata.

Seni di mana kekosongan berbicara dan kuas menyimpan jiwa: itulah seni lukis tradisional Korea.
Harapan, keseharian, dan gunung yang ditangkap oleh kuas, mekar sebagai esensi tanah ini.
id.back:
Joseon painters studied Chinese techniques, but what they painted was their own land and people.
Minhwa summoned good fortune with magpies and tigers; pungsokdo recorded the lives of the people.
Jingyeong sansuhwa did not paint idealized landscapes, but real mountains that unfolded before the eyes.

An art where the void speaks and the brush holds the soul: that is traditional Korean painting.
Hope, daily life, and the mountain captured by the brush, bloom as the essence of this land.

id.original:
Before a landscape scroll, Chinese literati read the world through ink.
Ink Wash painting raised mountains with gradations of ink alone and conjured mist through empty space.
Gongbi rendered every last petal with meticulous precision, offered to the emperor.

The wellspring of East Asian art, flowing for over a millennium, is Chinese traditional painting.
Meet the depth of a thousand years, forged in ink and color.
id.translated:
Di hadapan satu pemandangan yang dilukis, seorang sarjana Tiongkok membaca seluruh dunia.
Lukisan tinta mendirikan gunung hanya dengan gradasi tinta dan melahirkan kabut dari kekosongan.
Gongbi melukis hingga kelopak terakhir dengan presisi cermat untuk dipersembahkan kepada kaisar.

Sumber seribu tahun seni lukis oriental adalah seni lukis tradisional Tiongkok.
Seribu tahun yang ditenun dari tinta dan warna: akar seluruh seni lukis Timur.
id.back:
In the presence of one painted scene, a Chinese scholar reads the entire world.
Ink paintings erect mountains with just a gradation of ink and give birth to mist from emptiness.
Gongbi painted to the last petal with meticulous precision to present to the emperor.

The source of the thousand years of oriental painting is traditional Chinese painting.
A thousand years woven from ink and color: the root of all Eastern painting.

id.original:
In Edo’s streets, woodblock prints flourished; in Kyoto’s courts, decorative painting blossomed.
Ukiyo-e carved actors, beauties, and landscapes into woodblocks sold to the common people.
Rinpa painted irises and wind gods over gold leaf, captivating the eyes of the aristocracy.

Popular sensibility and courtly splendor coexisting — that is the art of Japanese traditional painting.
Born in streets and courts, crossing the ocean — meet Japanese painting that shook the Western art world.
id.translated:
Di jalanan Edo bermekaran cetakan ukiyo-e; di istana Kyoto, lukisan dekoratif.
Ukiyo-e mengukir aktor, kecantikan, dan pemandangan terkenal di atas balok kayu untuk rakyat.
Rinpa melukis iris dan dewa angin di atas lembaran emas, memikat kaum aristokrat.

Seni di mana sensibilitas rakyat dan kemegahan istana berdampingan: itulah seni lukis tradisional Jepang.
Lahir di jalanan dan istana, ia menyeberangi lautan dan mengguncang Barat.
id.back:
On the streets of Edo bloomed ukiyo-e prints; in the palaces of Kyoto, decorative paintings.
Ukiyo-e carved famous actors, beauties, and scenes on wooden blocks for the people.
Rinpa painted irises and wind gods on gold leaf, enchanting the aristocracy.

An art where folk sensibility and courtly splendor coexist: that is traditional Japanese painting.
Born in the streets and palaces, it crossed the seas and shook the West.

id.original:
Minhwa's vibrant palette and free-spirited composition have been applied to your image.
Painted in the five cardinal colors (blue, red, yellow, white, black) and arranged freely without perspective.

Peonies symbolize wealth, carp represent success, and tigers ward off evil.
Minhwa is Joseon folk art — hung on folding screens in every home, each painting carrying a wish.
id.translated:
Warna cerah dan komposisi bebas minhwa telah diterapkan.
Dilukis dengan lima warna pokok (biru, merah, kuning, putih, hitam) dan disusun bebas tanpa perspektif.

Peoni melambangkan kekayaan, ikan mas melambangkan keberhasilan, dan harimau mengusir roh jahat.
Minhwa adalah seni rakyat Joseon yang menghiasi layar lipat setiap rumah, membawa harapan dan doa.
id.back:
The bright colors and free composition of the minhwa have been applied.
Painted with five main colors (blue, red, yellow, white, black) and freely composed without perspective.

Peonies symbolize wealth, goldfish symbolize success, and tigers ward off evil spirits.
Minhwa is a Joseon folk art that adorns the folding screens of every home, carrying hopes and prayers.

id.original:
Pungsokdo's swift brushwork and restrained coloring have been applied to your image.
Fine-brush light-wash technique captures gestures and expressions, while empty space opens up the scene.

Wrestling men, women doing laundry, children dozing in village schools — everyday Joseon life comes alive.
Pungsokdo is Korean realism, brought to bloom by Kim Hong-do and Shin Yun-bok through the tip of a brush.
id.translated:
Goresan cepat dan warna sederhana pungsokdo telah diterapkan.
Teknik kuas halus dan warna ringan menangkap gerakan dan ekspresi, meninggalkan ruang dengan kekosongan.

Pegulat, tukang cuci, anak tertidur di sekolah — keseharian Joseon menjadi hidup.
Pungsokdo adalah realisme Korea yang Kim Hong-do dan Shin Yun-bok mekarkan di ujung kuas.
id.back:
The quick strokes and simple colors of pungsokdo have been applied.
The delicate brush technique and light colors capture movement and expression, leaving the space with emptiness.

Wrestlers, laundresses, children asleep at school - Joseon daily life comes alive.
Pungsokdo is Korean realism that Kim Hong-do and Shin Yun-bok bloom at the tip of the brush.

id.original:
Jingyeong Sansuhwa's vigorous texture strokes and bold composition have been applied to your image.
Breaking free from idealized landscapes, painters sketched the real mountains and rivers before their eyes.

The jagged peaks of Geumgangsan and rain falling over Inwangsan come alive through powerful brushstrokes.
Jingyeong Sansuhwa is the aesthetics of real landscape, perfected by Gyeomjae Jeong Seon — Korea's own vision of nature.
id.translated:
Goresan kuat dan komposisi berani jingyeong sansuhwa telah diterapkan.
Meninggalkan pemandangan ideal, ia melukis langsung apa yang terlihat: gunung nyata di depan mata.

Puncak tajam Gunung Geumgang dan hujan yang turun di Inwangsan menghidupkan kembali melalui goresan kuat.
Jingyeong Sansuhwa adalah estetika yang Gyeomjae Jeong Seon sempurnakan: pemandangan sejati tanah ini.
id.back:
The strong strokes and bold compositions of jingyeong sansuhwa have been applied.
Abandoning idealized scenes, he paints directly what is seen: the real mountain in front of the eyes.

The sharp peak of Mount Geumgang and the rain falling on Inwangsan come to life through strong strokes.
Jingyeong Sansuhwa is the aesthetic that Gyeomjae Jeong Seon perfected: the true scenery of this land.

id.original:
Gongbi's meticulous brushwork and luminous layered coloring have been applied to your image.
Fine brushes draw the outline first, then transparent colors are layered to build depth.

Flowers, birds, and figures are rendered strand by strand, captivating the imperial eye.
Gongbi is the pinnacle of East Asian fine painting — the height of color mastery, perfected by the court.
id.translated:
Garis presisi dan warna transparan gongbi telah diterapkan.
Kontur terlebih dahulu ditarik dengan kuas halus, lalu lapisan warna transparan ditumpuk untuk menciptakan kedalaman.

Bunga, burung, dan figur dilukis dengan presisi cermat, memikat hati kaisar.
Gongbi adalah puncak miniatur oriental dan kehalusan warna yang eksquisit, lahir dari istana.
id.back:
The precise lines and transparent color of the gongbi have been applied.
Contours were first drawn with a fine brush, and then layers of transparent color were stacked to create depth.

Flowers, birds and figures are painted with meticulous precision, captivating the emperor's heart.
Gongbi is the pinnacle of oriental miniature and exquisite subtlety of color, born at court.

id.original:
Ink Wash painting's fluid washes and contemplative empty space have been applied to your image.
Mountains, water, mist, and clouds are expressed through nothing but gradations of ink, and empty space becomes infinite.

The splashed-ink technique scatters ink like rain, capturing the vitality of nature.
Ink Wash painting is the purest form of East Asian painting — scholars transferred spirit, not form, onto silk.
id.translated:
Penyebaran tinta dan estetika kekosongan lukisan tinta telah diterapkan.
Hanya dengan gradasi tinta, gunung, air, kabut, dan awan diekspresikan; kekosongan menjadi ruang tak terbatas.

Teknik tinta yang dicipratkan menangkap daya hidup alam.
Lukisan tinta adalah intisari seribu tahun seni lukis oriental, di mana sarjana menuangkan jiwa ke atas kanvas.
id.back:
The spread of ink and the aesthetics of the void of ink painting have been applied.
With just the gradation of ink, mountains, water, mist and clouds are expressed; the void becomes an infinite space.

The technique of splashed ink captures the life force of nature.
Ink painting is the quintessence of a thousand years of oriental painting, where the scholar pours the soul onto the canvas.

id.original:
Ukiyo-e's striking outlines and vivid flat colors have been applied to your image.
Bold outlines define the form, and flat planes of color fill within — pure graphic impact.

Like Hokusai's *The Great Wave off Kanagawa*, a split second of nature's fury is carved into a single impression.
Ukiyo-e is the vision that traveled from East to West, inspiring the Impressionists to see art anew.
id.translated:
Kontur kuat dan bidang warna datar ukiyo-e telah diterapkan.
Garis berani mendefinisikan bentuk dan bagian dalamnya diisi bidang warna datar.

Seperti Gelombang Besar Kanagawa karya Hokusai, momen dinamis terukir di satu papan.
Ukiyo-e adalah pandangan yang menyeberangi dari Timur ke Barat, menginspirasi para impresionis.
id.back:
The strong contours and flat color fields of ukiyo-e have been applied.
Bold lines define the shape and the interior is filled with flat color fields.

Like Hokusai's Great Wave of Kanagawa, a dynamic moment is engraved on one board.
Ukiyo-e is a view that crosses from East to West, inspiring the impressionists.

id.original:
Rinpa's gold leaf decoration and bold composition have been applied to your image.
Pigment is laid over gold leaf, with colors pooled layer upon layer to create natural texture.

Like Ogata Korin's *Irises Screen*, vibrant nature blooms upon a field of gold.
Rinpa, born from aristocratic taste and inspiring Art Nouveau — the essence of Japanese decorative painting.
id.translated:
Dekorasi di atas lembaran emas dan komposisi berani rinpa telah diterapkan.
Di atas lembaran emas, pigmen diendapkan dan lapisan warna dibiarkan mengalir untuk menciptakan tekstur alami.

Seperti Iris karya Ogata Kōrin, alam yang megah mekar di atas emas.
Rinpa adalah intisari seni lukis dekoratif Jepang, lahir dari cita rasa aristokrat dan sumber inspirasi Art Nouveau.
id.back:
Decorations on gold sheet and a bold composition of rinpa have been applied.
On the gold sheet, pigments were deposited and layers of color were allowed to flow to create a natural texture.

Like Ogata Kōrin's Iris, magnificent nature blooms on gold.
Rinpa is the quintessence of Japanese decorative painting, born from aristocratic taste and the source of inspiration for Art Nouveau.

Korean traditional brushwork and the beauty of empty space have been applied to your image.
Scholars painted with ink gradations, while common folk painted with vivid color — both giving life to their world.

Empty space speaks, and spirit flows through the brush tip — the aesthetics of Korean painting.
Korean traditional painting, represented by Minhwa, Pungsokdo, and Jingyeong Sansuhwa, is art that blossomed over 500 years of Joseon. aesthetics, from Minhwa to Jingyeong Sansuhwa.

Chinese traditional ink and color harmony have been applied to your image.

The literati's spirit and the court's mastery coexist in Chinese painting.

رسم غونغبي كل بتلة بدقّة بالغة وأُهدي للإمبراطور.

ينبوع الفن الشرق آسيوي المتدفّق أكثر من ألف عام هو الرسم التقليدي الصيني.
تعرّف على عمق ألف عام صاغه الحبر واللون.

ar.translated:

Minhwa is the art of the Korean people from the Joseon era - hanging on the towers in every home, each painting holds a wish.

Flowers, birds, and figures are rendered strand by strand, captivating the imperial eye.
Gongbi is the pinnacle of East Asian fine painting — the height of color mastery, perfected by the court.

ضربات الفرشاة الدقيقة والتلوين الشفاف المتراكب لغونغبي تم تطبيقهما على صورتك.
فرشاة دقيقة ترسم الحدود أوّلاً ثم تتراكم ألوان شفافة لبناء العمق.

الأزهار والطيور والشخصيات مرسومة خيطاً بخيط، محرزةً إعجاب العين الإمبراطورية.

ar.back:

A delicate brush first draws the borders and then transparent colors build up to build depth.

Flowers, birds, and characters are drawn thread by thread, earning the admiration of the imperial eye.
Gongbei is the pinnacle of East Asian precision painting - the pinnacle of perfect color mastery in tile.

ar.original:
Ink Wash painting's fluid washes and contemplative empty space have been applied to your image.
Mountains, water, mist, and clouds are expressed through nothing but gradations of ink, and empty space becomes infinite.

The splashed-ink technique scatters ink like rain, capturing the vitality of nature.
Ink Wash painting is the purest form of East Asian painting — scholars transferred spirit, not form, onto silk.
ar.translated:
غسيلات الحبر المتدفّقة والفراغ التأمّلي لرسم الحبر المائي تم تطبيقهما على صورتك.
الجبال والماء والضباب والسحب تُعبَّر عنها بتدرّجات الحبر وحده، والفراغ يصبح لانهائياً.

تقنية رشّ الحبر تبعثر الحبر كالمطر مستحضرةً حيوية الطبيعة.
رسم الحبر هو أنقى أشكال الرسم الشرق آسيوي — نقل الأدباء الروح لا الشكل على الحرير.
ar.back:
The flowing washes of ink and the contemplative emptiness of watercolor are applied to your image.
Mountains, water, fog and clouds are expressed with ink gradients alone, and the void becomes infinite.

The ink spray technique disperses the ink like rain, evoking the vitality of nature.
Ink painting is the purest form of East Asian painting - the writers conveyed the spirit, not the form, on silk.

ar.original:
Ukiyo-e's striking outlines and vivid flat colors have been applied to your image.
Bold outlines define the form, and flat planes of color fill within — pure graphic impact.

Like Hokusai's *The Great Wave off Kanagawa*, a split second of nature's fury is carved into a single impression.
Ukiyo-e is the vision that traveled from East to West, inspiring the Impressionists to see art anew.
ar.translated:
الحدود اللافتة والألوان المسطّحة الزاهية لأوكييو-إي تم تطبيقهما على صورتك.
حدود جريئة تُحدّد الشكل ومسطّحات ألوان تملأ الداخل — قوة بيانية خالصة.

كـ«الموجة الكبيرة قبالة كاناغاوا» لهوكوساي، ثانية من جنون الطبيعة محفورة في طبعة واحدة.
أوكييو-إي هو الرؤية التي سافرت من الشرق إلى الغرب ملهِمةً الانطباعيين.
ar.back:
Ukiyo-e's striking borders and bright flat colors applied to your photo.
Bold borders define the shape and flat colors fill the interior - pure graphic power.

Like Hokusai's "Big Wave off Kanagawa," a second of nature's madness etched into a single print.
Ukiyo-e is the vision that traveled from East to West, inspiring the Impressionists.

ar.original:
Rinpa's gold leaf decoration and bold composition have been applied to your image.
Pigment is laid over gold leaf, with colors pooled layer upon layer to create natural texture.

Like Ogata Korin's *Irises Screen*, vibrant nature blooms upon a field of gold.
Rinpa, born from aristocratic taste and inspiring Art Nouveau — the essence of Japanese decorative painting.
ar.translated:
زخرفة ورق الذهب والتكوين الجريء لرينبا تم تطبيقهما على صورتك.
الأصباغ موضوعة على ورق الذهب مع تراكم الألوان طبقةً طبقةً لخلق ملمس طبيعي.

كـ«شاشة السوسن» لأوغاتا كورين، تتفتّح الطبيعة النابضة فوق حقل من الذهب.
رينبا هيوُلد من الذوق الأرستقراطي ملهِماً فن الآرت نوڤو — جوهر الرسم الزخرفي الياباني.
ar.back:
Gold leaf ornamentation and the bold composition of Rainpa have been applied to your image.
The pigments are placed on the gold leaf with the colors building up layer by layer to create a natural texture.

Like Ogata Koren's "Iris Screen," pulsating nature blooms over a field of gold.
Rinpa Hewald's aristocratic flair inspires Art Nouveau-the essence of Japanese decorative painting.

ar.original:
Korean traditional brushwork and the beauty of empty space have been applied to your image.
Scholars painted with ink gradations, while common folk painted with vivid color — both giving life to their world.

Empty space speaks, and spirit flows through the brush tip — the aesthetics of Korean painting.
Korean traditional painting, represented by Minhwa, Pungsokdo, and Jingyeong Sansuhwa, is art that blossomed over 500 years of Joseon. aesthetics, from Minhwa to Jingyeong Sansuhwa.
ar.translated:
ضربات الفرشاة التقليدية الكورية وجمال الفراغ تم تطبيقهما على صورتك.
رسم الأدباء بتدرّجات الحبر، والعامة بالألوان الزاهية — كلاهما يُحيي عالمه.

الفراغ يتكلّم، والروح تتدفّق عبر طرف الفرشاة — جماليات الرسم الكوري.
الرسم الكوري التقليدي، الممثل بمينهوا وبونغسوكدو وجينغيونغ سانسوهوا، هو فنّ ازدهر على مدى 500 عام من جوسون.
ar.back:
Traditional Korean brushstrokes and the beauty of space have been applied to your image.
The literati painted with ink shades, the commoners with bright colors - both bring their worlds to life.

The emptiness speaks, and the spirit flows through the tip of the brush - the aesthetics of Korean painting.
Traditional Korean painting, represented by Minhwa, Bongsukdo and Jingyong Sansuhwa, is an art that has flourished over the 500 years of Joseon.

ar.original:
Chinese traditional ink and color harmony have been applied to your image.
A single brushstroke raises mountains, and a single empty space conjures mist.

The literati's spirit and the court's mastery coexist in Chinese painting.
Chinese traditional painting, flowing through Gongbi and Ink Wash, is a vital wellspring of over a millennium of East Asian art tradition.
ar.translated:
انسجام الحبر والألوان التقليدي الصيني تم تطبيقه على صورتك.
ضربة فرشاة واحدة ترفع الجبال، وفراغ واحد يستحضر الضباب.

روح الأديب وإتقان البلاط يتعايشان في الرسم الصيني.
هذا هو ينبوع الفن الشرق آسيوي المتدفّق عبر غونغبي والحبر المائي أكثر من ألف عام.
ar.back:
Traditional Chinese ink and color harmony applied to your image.
One brushstroke lifts the mountains, one brushstroke evokes the mist.

The spirit of the literati and the mastery of the court coexist in Chinese painting.
This is the fountain of East Asian art flowing through gongbei and watercolor ink for over a thousand years.

ar.original:
Japanese traditional outlines and decorative color planes have been applied to your image.
Bold outlines and splendid coloring over gold leaf capture beauty in distinct ways.

Prints born from Edo popular culture and decorative painting of the court coexist in Japanese art.
Japanese traditional painting, born in streets and courts, crossed the ocean and profoundly influenced Western art.
ar.translated:
الحدود التقليدية اليابانية ومسطّحات الألوان الزخرفية تم تطبيقهما على صورتك.
حدود جريئة وتلوين باهر فوق ورق الذهب يلتقطان الجمال بطريقتين متمايزتين.

طباعة وُلدت من الثقافة الشعبية في إيدو والرسم الزخرفي للبلاط يتعايشان في الفن الياباني.
وُلد في الشوارع والبلاطات ثم عبر المحيط — الرسم الياباني الذي هزّ عالم الفن الغربي.
ar.back:
Traditional Japanese borders and decorative color schemes have been applied to your photo.
Bold borders and dazzling color over gold leaf capture beauty in two distinct ways.

A print born from Edo's popular culture and decorative tile painting coexist in Japanese art.
Born in the streets and tiles and then across the ocean - Japanese painting that rocked the Western art world.
The Soul Trapped in the Void
The Universe in Shades of Ink

ar.original: Street prints and golden decorative art
ar.back: Street Printing and Golden Decorative Art
The soul is drawn in ink
The transient world of woodblock printing

ar.original: Decorative beauty bloomed on gold leaf
ar.translated: الجمال الزخرفي يتفتّح على ورق الذهب
ar.back: Decorative beauty blooms on gold leaf

ar.original:
Korean painters learned Chinese brushwork, but what they painted was their own land and people.
Minhwa wished for fortune through magpies and tigers, while Pungsokdo captured the daily lives of common folk.
Jingyeong Sansuhwa depicted not idealized landscapes, but the real mountains and rivers before the painter's eyes.

Empty space speaks, and spirit flows through the brush tip — that is the art of Korean traditional painting.
Wishes, daily life, and landscapes captured by the brush — meet Korean painting, bloomed from its own soil.
ar.translated:
تعلّم الرسّامون الكوريون من ضربات الفرشاة الصينية، لكنّهم رسموا أرضهم وشعبهم.
مينهوا تمنّت الحظ عبر رسم العقعق والنمر، وبونغسوكدو التقطت الحياة اليومية للعامة.
جينغيونغ سانسوهوا رسمت لا المناظر الطبيعية المثالية، بل الجبال والأنهار الحقيقية أمام الرسّام.

الفراغ يتكلّم، والروح تتدفّق عبر طرف الفرشاة — هذا هو فن الرسم التقليدي الكوري.
التمنّيات والحياة اليومية والمناظر الطبيعية بقلم الفرشاة — تعرّف على الرسم الكوري المتفتّح من تربته الخاصة.
ar.back:
Korean painters learned from Chinese brushstrokes, but they painted their own land and people.
Minhwa wished for luck by painting magpies and tigers, and Bongsukdo captured the daily life of commoners.
Jingyong Sansuhwa painted not idealized landscapes, but real mountains and rivers in front of the painter.

The emptiness speaks, and the spirit flows through the tip of the brush-this is the art of traditional Korean painting.
Wishes, everyday life and landscapes with a brush - meet Korean painting blossoming from its own soil.

ar.original:
Before a landscape scroll, Chinese literati read the world through ink.
Ink Wash painting raised mountains with gradations of ink alone and conjured mist through empty space.
Gongbi rendered every last petal with meticulous precision, offered to the emperor.

The wellspring of East Asian art, flowing for over a millennium, is Chinese traditional painting.
Meet the depth of a thousand years, forged in ink and color.
ar.translated:
أمام رسالة منظر طبيعي، قرأ الأدباء الصينيون العالم عبر الحبر.
رسم الحبر المائي الجبال بتدرّجات الحبر وحده واستحضر الضباب من خلال الفراغ.
رسم غونغبي كل بتلة بدقّة بالغة وأُهدي للإمبراطور.

ينبوع الفن الشرق آسيوي المتدفّق أكثر من ألف عام هو الرسم التقليدي الصيني.
تعرّف على عمق ألف عام صاغه الحبر واللون.
ar.back:
In front of a landscape painting, Chinese writers read the world through ink.
Watercolor ink painted the mountains with ink gradients alone and evoked mist through emptiness.
Gongbei meticulously painted each petal and was dedicated to the emperor.

The fountain of East Asian art that has been flowing for over a thousand years is Chinese traditional painting.
Experience the depth of a thousand years forged by ink and color.

ar.original:
In Edo’s streets, woodblock prints flourished; in Kyoto’s courts, decorative painting blossomed.
Ukiyo-e carved actors, beauties, and landscapes into woodblocks sold to the common people.
Rinpa painted irises and wind gods over gold leaf, captivating the eyes of the aristocracy.

Popular sensibility and courtly splendor coexisting — that is the art of Japanese traditional painting.
Born in streets and courts, crossing the ocean — meet Japanese painting that shook the Western art world.
ar.translated:
في شوارع إيدو ازدهرت طباعة الألواح الخشبية، وفي بلاطات كيوتو تفتّح الرسم الزخرفي.
أوكييو-إي نحتت الممثلين والجميلات والمناظر الطبيعية في ألواح خشبية بيعت للعامة.
رينبا رسمت السوسن وآلهة الريح على ورق الذهب محرزةً إعجاب الأرستقراطية.

الحسّ الشعبي والبهاء الملكي يتعايشان — هذا هو فن الرسم التقليدي الياباني.
وُلد في الشوارع والبلاطات ثم عبر المحيط — تعرّف على الرسم الياباني الذي هزّ عالم الفن الغربي.
ar.back:
In the streets of Edo, woodblock printing flourished, and in the tiles of Kyoto, decorative painting blossomed.
Ukiyo-e carved actors, beauties, and landscapes into wooden panels that were sold to the public.
Rinpa painted irises and wind goddesses on gold leaf, winning the admiration of the aristocracy.

Folk sensibility and royal splendor coexist-this is the art of traditional Japanese painting.
Born in the streets and tiles and then across the ocean - meet the Japanese painting that rocked the Western art world.

ar.original:
Minhwa's vibrant palette and free-spirited composition have been applied to your image.
Painted in the five cardinal colors (blue, red, yellow, white, black) and arranged freely without perspective.

Peonies symbolize wealth, carp represent success, and tigers ward off evil.
Minhwa is Joseon folk art — hung on folding screens in every home, each painting carrying a wish.
ar.translated:
لوحة مينهوا النابضة وتكوينها الحرّ تم تطبيقهما على صورتك.
مرسومة بالألوان الخمسة الأساسية (الأزرق والأحمر والأصفر والأبيض والأسود) وترتيب حرّ دون منظور.

الأوركيد يرمز للثروة، والكارب يمثّل النجاح، والنمر يطرد الشر.
مينهوا هي فن الشعب الكوري من عصر جوسون — معلَّق على الأبراج في كل بيت، وكل لوحة تحمل أمنية.
ar.back:
Minhua's pulsating palette and free composition applied to your photo.
Painted with the five primary colors (blue, red, yellow, white and black) and a free-form arrangement without perspective.

The orchid symbolizes wealth, the carp represents success, and the tiger expels evil.
Minhwa is the art of the Korean people from the Joseon era - hanging on the towers in every home, each painting holds a wish.

Fine-brush light-wash technique captures gestures and expressions, while empty space opens up the scene.

Pungsokdo is Korean realism, brought to bloom by Kim Hong-do and Shin Yun-bok through the tip of a brush.

بونغسوكدو هو الواقعية الكورية التي أزهرها كيم هونغدو وشين يونبوك بطرف الفرشاة.
