كـ«شاشة السوسن» لأوغاتا كورين، تتفتّح الطبيعة النابضة فوق حقل من الذهب.
رينبا هيوُلد من الذوق الأرستقراطي ملهِماً فن الآرت نوڤو — جوهر الرسم الزخرفي الياباني.
ar.back:
Gold leaf ornamentation and the bold composition of Rainpa have been applied to your image.
The pigments are placed on the gold leaf with the colors building up layer by layer to create a natural texture.

Like Ogata Koren's "Iris Screen," pulsating nature blooms over a field of gold.
Rinpa Hewald's aristocratic flair inspires Art Nouveau-the essence of Japanese decorative painting.

ar.original:
Korean traditional brushwork and the beauty of empty space have been applied to your image.
Scholars painted with ink gradations, while common folk painted with vivid color — both giving life to their world.

Empty space speaks, and spirit flows through the brush tip — the aesthetics of Korean painting.
Korean traditional painting, represented by Minhwa, Pungsokdo, and Jingyeong Sansuhwa, is art that blossomed over 500 years of Joseon. aesthetics, from Minhwa to Jingyeong Sansuhwa.
ar.translated:
ضربات الفرشاة التقليدية الكورية وجمال الفراغ تم تطبيقهما على صورتك.
رسم الأدباء بتدرّجات الحبر، والعامة بالألوان الزاهية — كلاهما يُحيي عالمه.

الفراغ يتكلّم، والروح تتدفّق عبر طرف الفرشاة — جماليات الرسم الكوري.
الرسم الكوري التقليدي، الممثل بمينهوا وبونغسوكدو وجينغيونغ سانسوهوا، هو فنّ ازدهر على مدى 500 عام من جوسون.
ar.back:
Traditional Korean brushstrokes and the beauty of space have been applied to your image.
The literati painted with ink shades, the commoners with bright colors - both bring their worlds to life.

The emptiness speaks, and the spirit flows through the tip of the brush - the aesthetics of Korean painting.
Traditional Korean painting, represented by Minhwa, Bongsukdo and Jingyong Sansuhwa, is an art that has flourished over the 500 years of Joseon.

ar.original:
Chinese traditional ink and color harmony have been applied to your image.
A single brushstroke raises mountains, and a single empty space conjures mist.

The literati's spirit and the court's mastery coexist in Chinese painting.
Chinese traditional painting, flowing through Gongbi and Ink Wash, is a vital wellspring of over a millennium of East Asian art tradition.
ar.translated:
انسجام الحبر والألوان التقليدي الصيني تم تطبيقه على صورتك.
ضربة فرشاة واحدة ترفع الجبال، وفراغ واحد يستحضر الضباب.

روح الأديب وإتقان البلاط يتعايشان في الرسم الصيني.
هذا هو ينبوع الفن الشرق آسيوي المتدفّق عبر غونغبي والحبر المائي أكثر من ألف عام.
ar.back:
Traditional Chinese ink and color harmony applied to your image.
One brushstroke lifts the mountains, one brushstroke evokes the mist.

The spirit of the literati and the mastery of the court coexist in Chinese painting.
This is the fountain of East Asian art flowing through gongbei and watercolor ink for over a thousand years.

ar.original:
Japanese traditional outlines and decorative color planes have been applied to your image.
Bold outlines and splendid coloring over gold leaf capture beauty in distinct ways.

Prints born from Edo popular culture and decorative painting of the court coexist in Japanese art.
Japanese traditional painting, born in streets and courts, crossed the ocean and profoundly influenced Western art.
ar.translated:
الحدود التقليدية اليابانية ومسطّحات الألوان الزخرفية تم تطبيقهما على صورتك.
حدود جريئة وتلوين باهر فوق ورق الذهب يلتقطان الجمال بطريقتين متمايزتين.

طباعة وُلدت من الثقافة الشعبية في إيدو والرسم الزخرفي للبلاط يتعايشان في الفن الياباني.
وُلد في الشوارع والبلاطات ثم عبر المحيط — الرسم الياباني الذي هزّ عالم الفن الغربي.
ar.back:
Traditional Japanese borders and decorative color schemes have been applied to your photo.
Bold borders and dazzling color over gold leaf capture beauty in two distinct ways.

A print born from Edo's popular culture and decorative tile painting coexist in Japanese art.
Born in the streets and tiles and then across the ocean - Japanese painting that rocked the Western art world.

tr.back: The soul caught in the void

tr.original: Street prints and golden decorative art
tr.translated: Sokak baskıları ve altın dekoratif sanat
tr.back: Street prints and gold decorative art
Dreams of the people on canvas
Ephemeral world floating on woodblock print

tr.original: Decorative beauty bloomed on gold leaf
tr.translated: Altın yaprak üzerinde açan dekoratif güzellik
tr.back: Decorative beauty blooming on golden leaf

tr.original:
Korean painters learned Chinese brushwork, but what they painted was their own land and people.
Minhwa wished for fortune through magpies and tigers, while Pungsokdo captured the daily lives of common folk.
Jingyeong Sansuhwa depicted not idealized landscapes, but the real mountains and rivers before the painter's eyes.

Empty space speaks, and spirit flows through the brush tip — that is the art of Korean traditional painting.
Wishes, daily life, and landscapes captured by the brush — meet Korean painting, bloomed from its own soil.
tr.translated:
Koreli ressamlar Çin fırça tekniklerini öğrendi, ama kendi topraklarını ve insanlarını resmetti.
Minhwa saksağan ve kaplanlar aracılığıyla şans diledi; Pungsokdo sıradan halkın günlük yaşamını yakaladı.
Jingyeong Sansuhwa idealize manzaraları değil, ressamın gözleri önündeki gerçek dağları ve nehirleri çizdi.

Boşluk konuşur, ruh fırça ucundan akar — Kore geleneksel resminin sanatı bu.
Dilekler, günlük yaşam ve fırçayla yakalanan manzaralar — kendi toprağından açan Kore resmiyle tanış.
tr.back:
Korean painters learned Chinese brush techniques, but painted their own land and people.
Minhwa wished for luck through magpies and tigers; Pungsokdo captured the everyday life of ordinary people.
Jingyeong Sansuhwa painted not idealized landscapes, but real mountains and rivers before the painter's eyes.

Space speaks, soul flows through the brush tip - this is the art of Korean traditional painting.
Wishes, everyday life and landscapes captured with a brush - meet Korean painting blooming from its own soil.

tr.original:
Before a landscape scroll, Chinese literati read the world through ink.
Ink Wash painting raised mountains with gradations of ink alone and conjured mist through empty space.
Gongbi rendered every last petal with meticulous precision, offered to the emperor.

The wellspring of East Asian art, flowing for over a millennium, is Chinese traditional painting.
Meet the depth of a thousand years, forged in ink and color.
tr.translated:
Bir manzara tomarının karşısında Çinli aydınlar mürekkep aracılığıyla dünyayı okudu.
Mürekkep yıkama resmi, yalnızca mürekkep tonlamalarıyla dağlar yükseltti ve boşlukla sis yarattı.
Gongbi her yaprağı titiz bir hassasiyetle çizdi ve imparatora sundu.

Bin yılı aşkın süredir akan Doğu Asya sanatının kaynağı Çin geleneksel resmidir.
Mürekkep ve rengin yoğurduğu bin yılın derinliğiyle tanış.
tr.back:
Across a landscape scroll, Chinese intellectuals read the world through ink.
Ink wash painting raised mountains and created fog with emptiness with only ink gradations.
Gongbi drew each leaf with meticulous precision and presented it to the emperor.

Chinese traditional painting is the source of East Asian art that has been flowing for over a thousand years.
Meet the depth of a thousand years of ink and color.

tr.original:
In Edo’s streets, woodblock prints flourished; in Kyoto’s courts, decorative painting blossomed.
Ukiyo-e carved actors, beauties, and landscapes into woodblocks sold to the common people.
Rinpa painted irises and wind gods over gold leaf, captivating the eyes of the aristocracy.

Popular sensibility and courtly splendor coexisting — that is the art of Japanese traditional painting.
Born in streets and courts, crossing the ocean — meet Japanese painting that shook the Western art world.
tr.translated:
Edo sokaklarında tahta baskılar çiçek açtı; Kyoto saraylarında dekoratif resim yeşerdi.
Ukiyo-e aktörleri, güzelleri ve manzaraları tahta bloklara oyarak halka sattı.
Rinpa süsbezelyeleri ve rüzgâr tanrılarını altın yaprak üzerine çizerek aristokrasiyi büyledi.

Popüler duyarlılık ve saray ihtişamı bir arada — Japon geleneksel resminin sanatı bu.
Sokaklarda ve saraylarda doğup okyanusu aşan — Batı sanat dünyasını sarsan Japon resmiyle tanış.
tr.back:
Woodblock prints blossomed in the streets of Edo; decorative painting flourished in the palaces of Kyoto.
Ukiyo-e actors carved beauties and landscapes on blocks of wood and sold them to the public.
Rinpa enchanted the aristocracy by drawing ornamental peas and wind gods on gold leaf.

Popular sensibility and palace splendor in one - this is the art of Japanese traditional painting.
Meet the Japanese painting that was born in the streets and palaces and crossed the ocean - shaking the Western art world.

tr.original:
Minhwa's vibrant palette and free-spirited composition have been applied to your image.
Painted in the five cardinal colors (blue, red, yellow, white, black) and arranged freely without perspective.

Peonies symbolize wealth, carp represent success, and tigers ward off evil.
Minhwa is Joseon folk art — hung on folding screens in every home, each painting carrying a wish.
tr.translated:
Minhwa'nın canlı paleti ve özgür kompozisyonu görüntüne uygulandı.
Beş temel renkte (mavi, kırmızı, sarı, beyaz, siyah) boyandı; perspektif olmaksızın özgürce düzenlendi.

Şakayıklar serveti, sazan başarıyı, kaplanlar kötülüğü kovalar.
Minhwa, Joseon halk sanatıdır — her evin ekran bölmelerine asıldı; her tablo bir dilek taşıdı.
tr.back:
Minhwa's vibrant palette and free composition were applied to the image.
Painted in five basic colors (blue, red, yellow, white, black); freely arranged without perspective.

Peonies chase wealth, carp chase success, tigers chase evil.
Minhwa is Joseon folk art - hung in the screen partitions of every house; each painting carried a wish.

tr.original:
Pungsokdo's swift brushwork and restrained coloring have been applied to your image.
Fine-brush light-wash technique captures gestures and expressions, while empty space opens up the scene.

Wrestling men, women doing laundry, children dozing in village schools — everyday Joseon life comes alive.
Pungsokdo is Korean realism, brought to bloom by Kim Hong-do and Shin Yun-bok through the tip of a brush.
tr.translated:
Pungsokdo'nun hızlı fırça darbeleri ve ölçülü renklendirmesi görüntüne uygulandı.
İnce fırçalı hafif yıkama tekniği jest ve ifadeleri yakalar; boşluk sahneyi açar.

Güreşen erkekler, çamaşır yıkayan kadınlar, köy okullarında uyuklayan çocuklar — günlük Joseon yaşamı canlanıyor.
Pungsokdo, Kore gerçekçiliğidir; Kim Hong-do ve Shin Yun-bok'un fırça ucundan açtığı çiçek.
tr.back:
Pungsokdo's fast brushstrokes and restrained coloring are applied to the image.
A light wash technique with a fine brush captures gestures and expressions; space opens the scene.

Men wrestling, women washing clothes, children dozing in village schools - everyday Joseon life comes alive.
Pungsokdo is Korean realism, the flower blooming from the brush tip of Kim Hong-do and Shin Yun-bok.

tr.original:
Jingyeong Sansuhwa's vigorous texture strokes and bold composition have been applied to your image.
Breaking free from idealized landscapes, painters sketched the real mountains and rivers before their eyes.

The jagged peaks of Geumgangsan and rain falling over Inwangsan come alive through powerful brushstrokes.
Jingyeong Sansuhwa is the aesthetics of real landscape, perfected by Gyeomjae Jeong Seon — Korea's own vision of nature.
tr.translated:
Jingyeong Sansuhwa'nın güçlü doku darbeleri ve cesur kompozisyonu görüntüne uygulandı.
İdealize manzaralardan özgürleşerek ressamlar gözleri önündeki gerçek dağları ve nehirleri çizdi.

Geumgangsan'ın girintili zirveleri ve Inwangsan üzerinde yağan yağmur güçlü fırça darbeleriyle canlanıyor.
Jingyeong Sansuhwa, gerçek manzara estetiğidir; Gyeomjae Jeong Seon tarafından mükemmelleştirilen — Kore'nin doğaya özgü vizyonu.
tr.back:
Jingyeong Sansuhwa's strong texture strokes and bold composition were applied to the image.
Liberated from idealized landscapes, painters painted the real mountains and rivers before their eyes.

The indented peaks of Geumgangsan and the rain falling over Inwangsan come alive with powerful brushstrokes.
Jingyeong Sansuhwa is true landscape aesthetics; perfected by Gyeomjae Jeong Seon - Korea's unique vision of nature.

tr.original:
Gongbi's meticulous brushwork and luminous layered coloring have been applied to your image.
Fine brushes draw the outline first, then transparent colors are layered to build depth.

Flowers, birds, and figures are rendered strand by strand, captivating the imperial eye.
Gongbi is the pinnacle of East Asian fine painting — the height of color mastery, perfected by the court.
tr.translated:
Gongbi'nin titiz fırça işçiliği ve parlak katmanlı renklendirmesi görüntüne uygulandı.
İnce fırçalar önce konturu çiziyor, ardından şeffaf renkler derinlik oluşturmak için katmanlı uygulanıyor.

Çiçekler, kuşlar ve figürler saç saç boyandı; imparatorluk gözünü büyledi.
Gongbi, Doğu Asya ince resminin zirvesidir — saray tarafından mükemmelleştirilen renk ustalığının doruk noktası.
tr.back:
Gongbi's meticulous brushwork and bright layered coloring is applied to your image.
Thin brushes first outline the contour, then transparent colors are layered to create depth.

Flowers, birds and figures were painted hair by hair, captivating the imperial eye.
Gongbi is the pinnacle of East Asian fine painting - the culmination of the mastery of color perfected by the court.

tr.original:
Ink Wash painting's fluid washes and contemplative empty space have been applied to your image.
Mountains, water, mist, and clouds are expressed through nothing but gradations of ink, and empty space becomes infinite.

The splashed-ink technique scatters ink like rain, capturing the vitality of nature.
Ink Wash painting is the purest form of East Asian painting — scholars transferred spirit, not form, onto silk.
tr.translated:
Mürekkep yıkama resminin akışkan tonlamaları ve derin boşluğu görüntüne uygulandı.
Dağlar, su, sis ve bulutlar yalnızca mürekkep tonlamalarıyla ifade ediliyor; boşluk sonsuzlaşıyor.

Sıçratma tekniği mürekkebi yağmur gibi saçarak doğanın canlılığını yakalıyor.
Mürekkep yıkama resmi, Doğu Asya resminin en saf formudur — aydınlar forma değil, ruha ipek üzerine aktardı.
tr.back:
The fluid gradations and deep emptiness of ink wash painting are applied to your image.
Mountains, water, fog and clouds are expressed only in ink tones; the space becomes infinite.

The splatter technique captures the vibrancy of nature by scattering ink like rain.
Ink wash painting is the purest form of East Asian painting - the luminaries transferred spirit, not form, onto silk.

tr.original:
Ukiyo-e's striking outlines and vivid flat colors have been applied to your image.
Bold outlines define the form, and flat planes of color fill within — pure graphic impact.

Like Hokusai's *The Great Wave off Kanagawa*, a split second of nature's fury is carved into a single impression.
Ukiyo-e is the vision that traveled from East to West, inspiring the Impressionists to see art anew.
tr.translated:
Ukiyo-e'nin çarpıcı konturları ve canlı düz renkleri görüntüne uygulandı.
Cesur konturlar formu tanımlar ve renk düzlemleri içini doldurur — saf grafik güç.

Hokusai'nin "Kanagawa'da Büyük Dalga"sı gibi doğanın öfkesinin bir anlık parçası tek bir baskıya kazınmış.
Ukiyo-e Doğu'dan Batı'ya seyahat ederek İzlenimcileri sanata yeniden bakmaya ilham veren vizyon bu.
tr.back:
The striking contours and vibrant flat colors of Ukiyo-e are applied to your image.
Bold contours define the form and planes of color fill it - pure graphic power.

Like Hokusai's "Great Wave in Kanagawa", a glimpse of nature's fury is etched into a single print.
Ukiyo-e is the vision that inspired the Impressionists to look at art anew, traveling from East to West.

tr.original:
Rinpa's gold leaf decoration and bold composition have been applied to your image.
Pigment is laid over gold leaf, with colors pooled layer upon layer to create natural texture.

Like Ogata Korin's *Irises Screen*, vibrant nature blooms upon a field of gold.
Rinpa, born from aristocratic taste and inspiring Art Nouveau — the essence of Japanese decorative painting.
tr.translated:
Rinpa'nın altın yaprak süslemesi ve cesur kompozisyonu görüntüne uygulandı.
Altın yaprak üzerine boya uygulandı; doğal doku oluşturmak için renkler katman üstüne katman birikti.

Ogata Korin'in "Süsbezelyeler Ekranı" gibi canlı doğa bir altın alan üzerinde açıyor.
Rinpa Aristokrat zevkten doğup Art Nouveau'ya ilham veren — Japon dekoratif resminin özü.
tr.back:
Rinpa's gold leaf ornament and bold composition applied to your image.
Paint was applied over the gold leaf; colors were deposited layer upon layer to create natural texture.

Ogata Korin's "Screen of Ornamentals" as vibrant nature unfolds over a golden field.
Rinpa was born of aristocratic taste and inspired Art Nouveau - the essence of Japanese decorative painting.

tr.original:
Korean traditional brushwork and the beauty of empty space have been applied to your image.
Scholars painted with ink gradations, while common folk painted with vivid color — both giving life to their world.

Empty space speaks, and spirit flows through the brush tip — the aesthetics of Korean painting.
Korean traditional painting, represented by Minhwa, Pungsokdo, and Jingyeong Sansuhwa, is art that blossomed over 500 years of Joseon. aesthetics, from Minhwa to Jingyeong Sansuhwa.
tr.translated:
Kore geleneksel fırça işçiliği ve boşluk güzelliği görüntüne uygulandı.
Aydınlar mürekkep tonlamalarıyla, halk canlı renklerle boyadı — her ikisi de dünyasını canlandırdı.

Boşluk konuşur, ruh fırça ucundan akar — Kore resminin estetiği.
Bu, Minhwa'dan Jingyeong Sansuhwa'ya kadar 500 yıllık Joseon estetiğinin billurlaşmasıdır.
tr.back:
Korean traditional brushwork and the beauty of space were applied to the image.
The intellectuals painted with inky tones, the people with vibrant colors - both enlivened their world.

Space speaks, spirit flows from the brush tip - the aesthetics of Korean painting.
This is the crystallization of 500 years of Joseon aesthetics, from Minhwa to Jingyeong Sansuhwa.

tr.original:
Chinese traditional ink and color harmony have been applied to your image.
A single brushstroke raises mountains, and a single empty space conjures mist.

The literati's spirit and the court's mastery coexist in Chinese painting.
Chinese traditional painting, flowing through Gongbi and Ink Wash, is a vital wellspring of over a millennium of East Asian art tradition.
tr.translated:
Çin geleneksel mürekkebi ve renk uyumu görüntüne uygulandı.
Tek bir fırça darbesi dağlar yükseltir, tek bir boşluk sis çağırır.

Aydının ruhu ve sarayın ustalığı Çin resminde bir arada yaşar.
Bin yılı aşkın süredir Gongbi ve mürekkep yıkama aracılığıyla akan Doğu Asya sanatının kaynağı bu.
tr.back:
Chinese traditional ink and color harmony applied to the image.
A single brushstroke raises mountains, a single space summons mist.

The spirit of the intellectual and the mastery of the court coexist in Chinese painting.
This is the source of East Asian art that has flowed through Gongbi and ink wash for over a thousand years.

tr.original:
Japanese traditional outlines and decorative color planes have been applied to your image.
Bold outlines and splendid coloring over gold leaf capture beauty in distinct ways.

Prints born from Edo popular culture and decorative painting of the court coexist in Japanese art.
Japanese traditional painting, born in streets and courts, crossed the ocean and profoundly influenced Western art.
tr.translated:
Japon geleneksel konturları ve dekoratif renk düzlemleri görüntüne uygulandı.
Cesur konturlar ve altın yaprak üzerinde görkemli renklendirme güzelliği farklı biçimlerde yakalıyor.

Edo popüler kültüründen doğan baskılar ve saray dekoratif resmi Japon sanatında bir arada var olur.
Sokaklarda ve saraylarda doğup okyanusu aşan — Batı sanat dünyasını sarsan Japon resmi.
tr.back:
Japanese traditional contours and decorative color planes are applied to the image.
Bold contours and sumptuous coloring on gold leaf capture beauty in different ways.

Prints from Edo popular culture and palace decorative painting coexist in Japanese art.
Japanese painting, born in the streets and palaces, crossed the ocean - shaking the Western art world.
The soul caught in the void

Ukiyo-e actors carved beauties and landscapes on blocks of wood and sold them to the public.
Rinpa enchanted the aristocracy by drawing ornamental peas and wind gods on gold leaf.

Popular sensibility and palace splendor in one - this is the art of Japanese traditional painting.
Meet the Japanese painting that was born in the streets and palaces and crossed the ocean - shaking the Western art world.

Minhwa's vibrant palette and free-spirited composition have been applied to your image.
Painted in the five cardinal colors (blue, red, yellow, white, black) and arranged freely without perspective.

Peonies symbolize wealth, carp represent success, and tigers ward off evil.
Minhwa is Joseon folk art — hung on folding screens in every home, each painting carrying a wish.

Minhwa'nın canlı paleti ve özgür kompozisyonu görüntüne uygulandı.
Beş temel renkte (mavi, kırmızı, sarı, beyaz, siyah) boyandı; perspektif olmaksızın özgürce düzenlendi.

Şakayıklar serveti, sazan başarıyı, kaplanlar kötülüğü kovalar.
Minhwa, Joseon halk sanatıdır — her evin ekran bölmelerine asıldı; her tablo bir dilek taşıdı.
tr.back:
Minhwa's vibrant palette and free composition were applied to the image.
Painted in five basic colors (blue, red, yellow, white, black); freely arranged without perspective.

Peonies chase wealth, carp chase success, tigers chase evil.
Minhwa is Joseon folk art - hung in the screen partitions of every house; each painting carried a wish.

Pungsokdo's swift brushwork and restrained coloring have been applied to your image.

Wrestling men, women doing laundry, children dozing in village schools — everyday Joseon life comes alive.
Pungsokdo is Korean realism, brought to bloom by Kim Hong-do and Shin Yun-bok through the tip of a brush.
tr.translated:
Pungsokdo'nun hızlı fırça darbeleri ve ölçülü renklendirmesi görüntüne uygulandı.
İnce fırçalı hafif yıkama tekniği jest ve ifadeleri yakalar; boşluk sahneyi açar.

Güreşen erkekler, çamaşır yıkayan kadınlar, köy okullarında uyuklayan çocuklar — günlük Joseon yaşamı canlanıyor.
Pungsokdo, Kore gerçekçiliğidir; Kim Hong-do ve Shin Yun-bok'un fırça ucundan açtığı çiçek.
tr.back:
Pungsokdo's fast brushstrokes and restrained coloring are applied to the image.
A light wash technique with a fine brush captures gestures and expressions; space opens the scene.

Men wrestling, women washing clothes, children dozing in village schools - everyday Joseon life comes alive.
Pungsokdo is Korean realism, the flower blooming from the brush tip of Kim Hong-do and Shin Yun-bok.

tr.original:
Jingyeong Sansuhwa's vigorous texture strokes and bold composition have been applied to your image.
Breaking free from idealized landscapes, painters sketched the real mountains and rivers before their eyes.

The jagged peaks of Geumgangsan and rain falling over Inwangsan come alive through powerful brushstrokes.
Jingyeong Sansuhwa is the aesthetics of real landscape, perfected by Gyeomjae Jeong Seon — Korea's own vision of nature.

Jingyeong Sansuhwa'nın güçlü doku darbeleri ve cesur kompozisyonu görüntüne uygulandı.
İdealize manzaralardan özgürleşerek ressamlar gözleri önündeki gerçek dağları ve nehirleri çizdi.

Geumgangsan'ın girintili zirveleri ve Inwangsan üzerinde yağan yağmur güçlü fırça darbeleriyle canlanıyor.
Jingyeong Sansuhwa, gerçek manzara estetiğidir; Gyeomjae Jeong Seon tarafından mükemmelleştirilen — Kore'nin doğaya özgü vizyonu.
tr.back:
Jingyeong Sansuhwa's strong texture strokes and bold composition were applied to the image.
Liberated from idealized landscapes, painters painted the real mountains and rivers before their eyes.

The indented peaks of Geumgangsan and the rain falling over Inwangsan come alive with powerful brushstrokes.
Jingyeong Sansuhwa is true landscape aesthetics; perfected by Gyeomjae Jeong Seon - Korea's unique vision of nature.

tr.original:
Gongbi's meticulous brushwork and luminous layered coloring have been applied to your image.
Fine brushes draw the outline first, then transparent colors are layered to build depth.

Flowers, birds, and figures are rendered strand by strand, captivating the imperial eye.
Gongbi is the pinnacle of East Asian fine painting — the height of color mastery, perfected by the court.

Gongbi'nin titiz fırça işçiliği ve parlak katmanlı renklendirmesi görüntüne uygulandı.
İnce fırçalar önce konturu çiziyor, ardından şeffaf renkler derinlik oluşturmak için katmanlı uygulanıyor.

Gongbi, Doğu Asya ince resminin zirvesidir — saray tarafından mükemmelleştirilen renk ustalığının doruk noktası.
tr.back:
Gongbi's meticulous brushwork and bright layered coloring is applied to your image.
Thin brushes first outline the contour, then transparent colors are layered to create depth.

Flowers, birds and figures were painted hair by hair, captivating the imperial eye.
Gongbi is the pinnacle of East Asian fine painting - the culmination of the mastery of color perfected by the court.

tr.original:
Ink Wash painting's fluid washes and contemplative empty space have been applied to your image.
Mountains, water, mist, and clouds are expressed through nothing but gradations of ink, and empty space becomes infinite.

The splashed-ink technique scatters ink like rain, capturing the vitality of nature.
Ink Wash painting is the purest form of East Asian painting — scholars transferred spirit, not form, onto silk.
tr.translated:
Mürekkep yıkama resminin akışkan tonlamaları ve derin boşluğu görüntüne uygulandı.
Dağlar, su, sis ve bulutlar yalnızca mürekkep tonlamalarıyla ifade ediliyor; boşluk sonsuzlaşıyor.

Sıçratma tekniği mürekkebi yağmur gibi saçarak doğanın canlılığını yakalıyor.
Mürekkep yıkama resmi, Doğu Asya resminin en saf formudur — aydınlar forma değil, ruha ipek üzerine aktardı.
tr.back:
The fluid gradations and deep emptiness of ink wash painting are applied to your image.
Mountains, water, fog and clouds are expressed only in ink tones; the space becomes infinite.

The splatter technique captures the vibrancy of nature by scattering ink like rain.
Ink wash painting is the purest form of East Asian painting - the luminaries transferred spirit, not form, onto silk.

tr.original:

Bold outlines define the form, and flat planes of color fill within — pure graphic impact.

Like Hokusai's *The Great Wave off Kanagawa*, a split second of nature's fury is carved into a single impression.
Ukiyo-e is the vision that traveled from East to West, inspiring the Impressionists to see art anew.
tr.translated:
Ukiyo-e'nin çarpıcı konturları ve canlı düz renkleri görüntüne uygulandı.
Cesur konturlar formu tanımlar ve renk düzlemleri içini doldurur — saf grafik güç.

Hokusai'nin "Kanagawa'da Büyük Dalga"sı gibi doğanın öfkesinin bir anlık parçası tek bir baskıya kazınmış.
Ukiyo-e Doğu'dan Batı'ya seyahat ederek İzlenimcileri sanata yeniden bakmaya ilham veren vizyon bu.
tr.back:
The striking contours and vibrant flat colors of Ukiyo-e are applied to your image.
Bold contours define the form and planes of color fill it - pure graphic power.

Like Hokusai's "Great Wave in Kanagawa", a glimpse of nature's fury is etched into a single print.
Ukiyo-e is the vision that inspired the Impressionists to look at art anew, traveling from East to West.

tr.original:

Like Ogata Korin's *Irises Screen*, vibrant nature blooms upon a field of gold.
Rinpa, born from aristocratic taste and inspiring Art Nouveau — the essence of Japanese decorative painting.

Rinpa'nın altın yaprak süslemesi ve cesur kompozisyonu görüntüne uygulandı.
Altın yaprak üzerine boya uygulandı; doğal doku oluşturmak için renkler katman üstüne katman birikti.

Ogata Korin'in "Süsbezelyeler Ekranı" gibi canlı doğa bir altın alan üzerinde açıyor.
Rinpa Aristokrat zevkten doğup Art Nouveau'ya ilham veren — Japon dekoratif resminin özü.
tr.back:
Rinpa's gold leaf ornament and bold composition applied to your image.
Paint was applied over the gold leaf; colors were deposited layer upon layer to create natural texture.

Ogata Korin's "Screen of Ornamentals" as vibrant nature unfolds over a golden field.
Rinpa was born of aristocratic taste and inspired Art Nouveau - the essence of Japanese decorative painting.

tr.original:
Korean traditional brushwork and the beauty of empty space have been applied to your image.
Scholars painted with ink gradations, while common folk painted with vivid color — both giving life to their world.

Empty space speaks, and spirit flows through the brush tip — the aesthetics of Korean painting.
Korean traditional painting, represented by Minhwa, Pungsokdo, and Jingyeong Sansuhwa, is art that blossomed over 500 years of Joseon. aesthetics, from Minhwa to Jingyeong Sansuhwa.

Kore geleneksel fırça işçiliği ve boşluk güzelliği görüntüne uygulandı.

Korean traditional brushwork and the beauty of space were applied to the image.
The intellectuals painted with inky tones, the people with vibrant colors - both enlivened their world.

Space speaks, spirit flows from the brush tip - the aesthetics of Korean painting.
This is the crystallization of 500 years of Joseon aesthetics, from Minhwa to Jingyeong Sansuhwa.

tr.original:

A single brushstroke raises mountains, and a single empty space conjures mist.

The literati's spirit and the court's mastery coexist in Chinese painting.
Chinese traditional painting, flowing through Gongbi and Ink Wash, is a vital wellspring of over a millennium of East Asian art tradition.
tr.translated:
Çin geleneksel mürekkebi ve renk uyumu görüntüne uygulandı.

Bin yılı aşkın süredir Gongbi ve mürekkep yıkama aracılığıyla akan Doğu Asya sanatının kaynağı bu.
tr.back:
Chinese traditional ink and color harmony applied to the image.
A single brushstroke raises mountains, a single space summons mist.

pt.original:
Korean painters learned Chinese brushwork, but what they painted was their own land and people.
Minhwa wished for fortune through magpies and tigers, while Pungsokdo captured the daily lives of common folk.
Jingyeong Sansuhwa depicted not idealized landscapes, but the real mountains and rivers before the painter's eyes.

Empty space speaks, and spirit flows through the brush tip — that is the art of Korean traditional painting.
Wishes, daily life, and landscapes captured by the brush — meet Korean painting, bloomed from its own soil.
pt.translated:
Os pintores coreanos aprenderam a técnica chinesa do pincel, mas pintaram a sua própria terra e o seu próprio povo.
O Minhwa desejou sorte através de pias e tigres; o Pungsokdo capturou o quotidiano do povo comum.
O Jingyeong Sansuhwa retratou não paisagens idealizadas, mas as montanhas e rios reais diante dos olhos do pintor.

O espaço vazio fala, e o espírito flui pela ponta do pincel — esta é a arte da pintura tradicional coreana.
Desejos, vida quotidiana e paisagens capturadas pelo pincel — conheça a pintura coreana, florescida do seu próprio solo.

Korean painters learned the Chinese brush technique, but they painted their own land and their own people.
Minhwa wished luck through sinks and tigers; Pungsokdo captured the everyday lives of ordinary people.
The Jingyeong Sansuhwa portrayed not idealized landscapes, but the real mountains and rivers before the painter's eyes.

Empty space speaks, and the spirit flows through the tip of the brush - this is the art of traditional Korean painting.
Desires, everyday life and landscapes captured by the brush - get to know Korean painting, blossomed from its own soil.

pt.original:

Gongbi rendered every last petal with meticulous precision, offered to the emperor.

The wellspring of East Asian art, flowing for over a millennium, is Chinese traditional painting.
Meet the depth of a thousand years, forged in ink and color.

Diante de um rolo de paisagem, os letrados chineses leram o mundo através da tinta.
A pintura de tinta e aguada ergueu montanhas apenas com gradações de tinta e evocou a neblina através do espaço vazio.
O Gongbi renderizou cada pétala com meticulosa precisão, oferecida ao imperador.

A fonte da arte do Leste Asiático, fluindo há mais de mil anos, é a pintura tradicional chinesa.
Conheça a profundidade de mil anos, forjada em tinta e cor.

The Gongbi rendered each petal with meticulous precision, offered to the emperor.

The source of East Asian art, flowing for over a thousand years, is traditional Chinese painting.
Discover the depth of a thousand years, forged in ink and color.

Traditional Korean painting, represented by Minhwa, Pungsokdo and Jingyeong Sansuhwa, is an art that flourished during 500 years of Joseon.

The literati's spirit and the court's mastery coexist in Chinese painting.
Chinese traditional painting, flowing through Gongbi and Ink Wash, is a vital wellspring of over a millennium of East Asian art tradition.

Japanese traditional outlines and decorative color planes have been applied to your image.

Prints born from Edo popular culture and decorative painting of the court coexist in Japanese art.
Japanese traditional painting, born in streets and courts, crossed the ocean and profoundly influenced Western art.

Contornos ousados e coloração esplêndida sobre folha de ouro capturam a beleza de formas distintas.

Gravuras nascidas da cultura popular de Edo e a pintura decorativa da corte coexistem na arte japonesa.

Prints born from the popular culture of Edo and decorative court painting coexist in Japanese art.
Born in streets and courts, crossing the ocean - Japanese painting that shook the Western art world.

Korean painters learned Chinese brushwork, but what they painted was their own land and people.
Minhwa wished for fortune through magpies and tigers, while Pungsokdo captured the daily lives of common folk.
Jingyeong Sansuhwa depicted not idealized landscapes, but the real mountains and rivers before the painter's eyes.

Empty space speaks, and spirit flows through the brush tip — that is the art of Korean traditional painting.
Wishes, daily life, and landscapes captured by the brush — meet Korean painting, bloomed from its own soil.

Os pintores coreanos aprenderam a técnica chinesa do pincel, mas pintaram a sua própria terra e o seu próprio povo.
O Minhwa desejou sorte através de pias e tigres; o Pungsokdo capturou o quotidiano do povo comum.
O Jingyeong Sansuhwa retratou não paisagens idealizadas, mas as montanhas e rios reais diante dos olhos do pintor.

O espaço vazio fala, e o espírito flui pela ponta do pincel — esta é a arte da pintura tradicional coreana.
Desejos, vida quotidiana e paisagens capturadas pelo pincel — conheça a pintura coreana, florescida do seu próprio solo.
pt.back:
Korean painters learned the Chinese brush technique, but they painted their own land and their own people.
Minhwa wished luck through sinks and tigers; Pungsokdo captured the everyday lives of ordinary people.
The Jingyeong Sansuhwa portrayed not idealized landscapes, but the real mountains and rivers before the painter's eyes.

Empty space speaks, and the spirit flows through the tip of the brush - this is the art of traditional Korean painting.
Desires, everyday life and landscapes captured by the brush - get to know Korean painting, blossomed from its own soil.

pt.original:
Before a landscape scroll, Chinese literati read the world through ink.
Ink Wash painting raised mountains with gradations of ink alone and conjured mist through empty space.
Gongbi rendered every last petal with meticulous precision, offered to the emperor.

The wellspring of East Asian art, flowing for over a millennium, is Chinese traditional painting.
Meet the depth of a thousand years, forged in ink and color.
pt.translated:
Diante de um rolo de paisagem, os letrados chineses leram o mundo através da tinta.
A pintura de tinta e aguada ergueu montanhas apenas com gradações de tinta e evocou a neblina através do espaço vazio.
O Gongbi renderizou cada pétala com meticulosa precisão, oferecida ao imperador.

A fonte da arte do Leste Asiático, fluindo há mais de mil anos, é a pintura tradicional chinesa.
Conheça a profundidade de mil anos, forjada em tinta e cor.
pt.back:
In front of a landscape roller, the Chinese literati read the world through ink.
The ink and watercolor painting raised mountains with only gradations of ink and evoked mist through empty space.
The Gongbi rendered each petal with meticulous precision, offered to the emperor.

The source of East Asian art, flowing for over a thousand years, is traditional Chinese painting.
Discover the depth of a thousand years, forged in ink and color.

pt.original:
In Edo’s streets, woodblock prints flourished; in Kyoto’s courts, decorative painting blossomed.
Ukiyo-e carved actors, beauties, and landscapes into woodblocks sold to the common people.
Rinpa painted irises and wind gods over gold leaf, captivating the eyes of the aristocracy.

Popular sensibility and courtly splendor coexisting — that is the art of Japanese traditional painting.
Born in streets and courts, crossing the ocean — meet Japanese painting that shook the Western art world.
pt.translated:
Nas ruas de Edo, as gravuras em madeira floresceram; nas cortes de Quioto, a pintura decorativa desabrochou.
O Ukiyo-e esculpiu atores, belezas e paisagens em blocos de madeira vendidos ao povo comum.
O Rinpa pintou íris e deuses do vento sobre folha de ouro, cativando os olhos da aristocracia.

Sensibilidade popular e esplendor cortesão coexistindo — esta é a arte da pintura tradicional japonesa.
Nascida em ruas e cortes, cruzando o oceano — conheça a pintura japonesa que sacudiu o mundo da arte ocidental.
pt.back:
In the streets of Edo, wood carvings flourished; in the courts of Kyoto, decorative painting blossomed.
The Ukiyo-e carved actors, beauties and landscapes on blocks of wood sold to the common people.
The Rinpa painted irises and wind gods on gold leaf, captivating the eyes of the aristocracy.

Popular sensibility and courtly splendor coexisting - this is the art of traditional Japanese painting.
Born in streets and courts, crossing the ocean - get to know the Japanese painting that shook up the Western art world.

pt.original:
Minhwa's vibrant palette and free-spirited composition have been applied to your image.
Painted in the five cardinal colors (blue, red, yellow, white, black) and arranged freely without perspective.

Peonies symbolize wealth, carp represent success, and tigers ward off evil.
Minhwa is Joseon folk art — hung on folding screens in every home, each painting carrying a wish.
pt.translated:
A paleta vibrante e a composição livre do Minhwa foram aplicadas à sua imagem.
Pintado nas cinco cores fundamentais (azul, vermelho, amarelo, branco, preto) e disposto livremente sem perspetiva.

As peônias simbolizam riqueza, as carpas representam o sucesso, e os tigres espantam o mal.
Minhwa é a arte popular de Joseon — pendurada nas biombos de cada casa, cada pintura carregando um desejo.
pt.back:
Minhwa's vibrant palette and free composition were applied to his image.
Painted in the five fundamental colors (blue, red, yellow, white, black) and freely arranged without perspective.

Peonies symbolize wealth, carp represent success, and tigers ward off evil.
Minhwa is Joseon folk art - hung on the screens of every house, each painting carrying a wish.

pt.original:
Pungsokdo's swift brushwork and restrained coloring have been applied to your image.
Fine-brush light-wash technique captures gestures and expressions, while empty space opens up the scene.

Wrestling men, women doing laundry, children dozing in village schools — everyday Joseon life comes alive.
Pungsokdo is Korean realism, brought to bloom by Kim Hong-do and Shin Yun-bok through the tip of a brush.
pt.translated:
As pinceladas rápidas e a coloração contida do Pungsokdo foram aplicadas à sua imagem.
A técnica de aguada leve com pincel fino captura gestos e expressões; o espaço vazio abre a cena.

Homens a lutar, mulheres a lavar roupa, crianças a dormitar em escolas de aldeia — a vida quotidiana de Joseon ganha vida.
Pungsokdo é o realismo coreano, desabrochado pela ponta do pincel de Kim Hong-do e Shin Yun-bok.
pt.back:
Pungsokdo's quick brushstrokes and restrained coloring were applied to his image.
The light watercolor technique with a fine brush captures gestures and expressions; the empty space opens up the scene.

Men fighting, women washing clothes, children sleeping in village schools - everyday life in Joseon comes to life.
Pungsokdo is Korean realism, blossomed by the tip of Kim Hong-do and Shin Yun-bok's brush.

pt.original:
Jingyeong Sansuhwa's vigorous texture strokes and bold composition have been applied to your image.
Breaking free from idealized landscapes, painters sketched the real mountains and rivers before their eyes.

The jagged peaks of Geumgangsan and rain falling over Inwangsan come alive through powerful brushstrokes.
Jingyeong Sansuhwa is the aesthetics of real landscape, perfected by Gyeomjae Jeong Seon — Korea's own vision of nature.
pt.translated:
As vigorosas pinceladas de textura e a composição ousada do Jingyeong Sansuhwa foram aplicadas à sua imagem.
Libertando-se das paisagens idealizadas, os pintores esboçavam as montanhas e rios reais diante dos seus olhos.

Os picos dentados do Geumgangsan e a chuva caindo sobre o Inwangsan ganham vida através de pinceladas poderosas.
Jingyeong Sansuhwa é a estética da paisagem real, aperfeiçoada por Gyeomjae Jeong Seon — a visão da Coreia sobre a natureza.
pt.back:
Jingyeong Sansuhwa's vigorous, textured brushstrokes and bold composition were applied to his imagery.
Freeing themselves from idealized landscapes, the painters sketched the real mountains and rivers before their eyes.

The jagged peaks of the Geumgangsan and the rain falling on the Inwangsan come to life through powerful brushstrokes.
Jingyeong Sansuhwa is the aesthetic of the real landscape, perfected by Gyeomjae Jeong Seon - Korea's vision of nature.

pt.original:
Gongbi's meticulous brushwork and luminous layered coloring have been applied to your image.
Fine brushes draw the outline first, then transparent colors are layered to build depth.

Flowers, birds, and figures are rendered strand by strand, captivating the imperial eye.
Gongbi is the pinnacle of East Asian fine painting — the height of color mastery, perfected by the court.
pt.translated:
A pincelada meticulosa e a coloração em camadas luminosas do Gongbi foram aplicadas à sua imagem.
Pincéis finos traçam primeiro o contorno; depois cores transparentes são sobrepostas para criar profundidade.

Flores, pássaros e figuras são renderizados fio a fio, cativando o olhar imperial.
Gongbi é o cume da pintura fina do Leste Asiático — o auge do domínio da cor, aperfeiçoado pela corte.
pt.back:
Gongbi's meticulous brushstrokes and luminous layered coloring have been applied to his image.
Fine brushes first trace the outline; then transparent colors are superimposed to create depth.

Flowers, birds and figures are rendered thread by thread, captivating the imperial eye.
Gongbi is the pinnacle of East Asian fine painting - the height of color mastery, perfected by the court.

pt.original:
Ink Wash painting's fluid washes and contemplative empty space have been applied to your image.
Mountains, water, mist, and clouds are expressed through nothing but gradations of ink, and empty space becomes infinite.

The splashed-ink technique scatters ink like rain, capturing the vitality of nature.
Ink Wash painting is the purest form of East Asian painting — scholars transferred spirit, not form, onto silk.
pt.translated:
As aguadas fluidas e o espaço vazio contemplativo da pintura de tinta e aguada foram aplicados à sua imagem.
Montanhas, água, neblina e nuvens são expressos apenas com gradações de tinta; o espaço vazio torna-se infinito.

A técnica de salpicadura de tinta espalha a tinta como chuva, capturando a vitalidade da natureza.
A pintura a tinta é a forma mais pura da pintura do Leste Asiático — os letrados transferiram o espírito, não a forma, para a seda.
pt.back:
The fluid watercolors and contemplative empty space of ink and watercolor painting were applied to his image.
Mountains, water, mist and clouds are expressed only with gradations of paint; empty space becomes infinite.

The technique of splashing paint spreads the paint like rain, capturing the vitality of nature.
Ink painting is the purest form of East Asian painting - the literati transferred the spirit, not the form, to silk.

pt.original:
Ukiyo-e's striking outlines and vivid flat colors have been applied to your image.
Bold outlines define the form, and flat planes of color fill within — pure graphic impact.

Like Hokusai's *The Great Wave off Kanagawa*, a split second of nature's fury is carved into a single impression.
Ukiyo-e is the vision that traveled from East to West, inspiring the Impressionists to see art anew.
pt.translated:
Os contornos marcantes e as cores planas vibrantes do Ukiyo-e foram aplicados à sua imagem.
Contornos ousados definem a forma; planos de cor preenchem o interior — puro impacto gráfico.

Como "A Grande Onda de Kanagawa" de Hokusai, uma fração de segundo da fúria da natureza é gravada numa única impressão.
Ukiyo-e é a visão que viajou do Oriente para o Ocidente, inspirando os impressionistas a ver a arte de novo.
pt.back:
Ukiyo-e's striking contours and vibrant flat colors have been applied to its image.
Bold contours define the shape; planes of color fill the interior - pure graphic impact.

Like Hokusai's "The Great Wave of Kanagawa", a split second of nature's fury is recorded in a single print.
Ukiyo-e is the vision that traveled from East to West, inspiring the Impressionists to see art anew.

pt.original:
Rinpa's gold leaf decoration and bold composition have been applied to your image.
Pigment is laid over gold leaf, with colors pooled layer upon layer to create natural texture.

Like Ogata Korin's *Irises Screen*, vibrant nature blooms upon a field of gold.
Rinpa, born from aristocratic taste and inspiring Art Nouveau — the essence of Japanese decorative painting.
pt.translated:
A decoração em folha de ouro e a composição ousada do Rinpa foram aplicadas à sua imagem.
O pigmento é depositado sobre folha de ouro; as cores acumulam-se camada sobre camada para criar textura natural.

Como o "Biombo das Íris" de Ogata Korin, a natureza vibrante desabrocha sobre um campo de ouro.
Rinpa é nascido do gosto aristocrático e inspirando o Art Nouveau — a essência da pintura decorativa japonesa.
pt.back:
Rinpa's gold leaf decoration and bold composition were applied to his image.
The pigment is deposited on gold leaf; the colors build up layer upon layer to create natural texture.

Like Ogata Korin's "Screen of Irises", vibrant nature blossoms on a field of gold.
Rinpa is born of aristocratic taste and inspired Art Nouveau - the essence of Japanese decorative painting.

Empty space speaks, and spirit flows through the brush tip — the aesthetics of Korean painting.
Korean traditional painting, represented by Minhwa, Pungsokdo, and Jingyeong Sansuhwa, is art that blossomed over 500 years of Joseon. aesthetics, from Minhwa to Jingyeong Sansuhwa.

O espaço vazio fala, e o espírito flui pela ponta do pincel — a estética da pintura coreana.
